objectModel.name: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference FOM
objectModel.purpose: The RPR FOM supports interoperability for real-time, platform oriented defense simulation.
objectModel.references: Text Document: Standard for Guidance, Rationale, and Interoperability Modalities for the Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model (RPR FOM) SISO-STD-001-2025 4 November 2025, Text Document: IEEE Standard for Distributed Interactive Simulation - Application Protocols IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 19 December 2012, Text Document: Reference for Enumerations for Simulation Interoperability Version 35 27 April 2025,

objectClass.name: BaseEntity
objectClass.semantics: A base class of aggregate and discrete scenario domain participants. The BaseEntity class is characterized by being located at a particular location in space and independently movable, if capable of movement at all. It specifically excludes elements normally considered to be a component of another element. The BaseEntity class is intended to be a container for common attributes for entities of this type. Since it lacks sufficient class specific attributes that are required for simulation purposes, federates cannot publish objects of this class. Certain simulation management federates, e.g. viewers, may subscribe to this class. Simulation federates will normally subscribe to one of the subclasses, to gain the extra information required to properly simulate the entity.

attribute.name: EntityType
attribute.semantics: The category of the entity.

attribute.name: EntityIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The unique identifier for the entity instance.

attribute.name: IsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: Spatial
attribute.semantics: Spatial state of the entity's coordinate system with respect to the world coordinate system.

attribute.name: RelativeSpatial
attribute.semantics: Spatial state of the entity's coordinate system with respect to the host entity's coordinate system. References to the host entity are provided in the IsPartOf attribute.

objectClass.name: PhysicalEntity
objectClass.semantics: A base class of all discrete platform scenario domain participants.

attribute.name: LVCIndicator
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the data contained in this object instance is related to a Live, Virtual, or Constructive entity.

attribute.name: AcousticSignatureIndex
attribute.semantics: Index used to obtain the acoustics (sound through air) signature state of the entity.

attribute.name: AlternateEntityType
attribute.semantics: The category of entity to be used when viewed by entities on the 'opposite' side.

attribute.name: ForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity belongs to.

attribute.name: InfraredSignatureIndex
attribute.semantics: Index used to obtain the infra-red signature state of the entity.

attribute.name: LiveEntityMeasuredSpeed
attribute.semantics: The entity's own measurement of speed (e.g. air speed for aircraft).

attribute.name: Marking
attribute.semantics: A unique marking or combination of characters used to distinguish the entity from other entities.

attribute.name: PropulsionSystemsData
attribute.semantics: The basic operating data of the propulsion systems aboard the entity.

attribute.name: RadarCrossSectionSignatureIndex
attribute.semantics: Index used to obtain the radar cross section signature state of the entity.

attribute.name: VectoringNozzleSystemData
attribute.semantics: The basic operational data for the vectoring nozzle systems aboard the entity.

attribute.name: ExtendedDamageStatus
attribute.semantics: Detailed information on damage sustained by the entity.

attribute.name: VariableParametersArray
attribute.semantics: Array of information on articulated parts, attached parts, and other data associated with an entity.

objectClass.name: Platform
objectClass.semantics: A physical object under the control of armed forces upon which sensor, communication, or weapon systems may be mounted.

attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical6 RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual paint design.

attribute.name: MobilityKilled
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical13
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of moving on its own power.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical14
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeEmanating
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: IsEngineEmittingSmoke
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the engine is emitting smoke.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: PowerPlantOn
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the power plant is on or off.

attribute.name: AmmunitionSupplyCapability
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical15 RPRnotePhysical16 RPRnotePhysical17 RPRnotePhysical18 RPRnotePhysical19
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of ammunition in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: FuelSupplyCapability
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical15 RPRnotePhysical16 RPRnotePhysical17 RPRnotePhysical18 RPRnotePhysical19
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of fuel in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: RecoveryCapability
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical15 RPRnotePhysical16 RPRnotePhysical17 RPRnotePhysical18 RPRnotePhysical19
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to provide recovery (e.g., towing) services in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: RepairCapability
attribute.nameNotes: RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical15 RPRnotePhysical16 RPRnotePhysical17 RPRnotePhysical18 RPRnotePhysical19
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply certain repair services in response to an appropriate service request.

objectClass.name: Aircraft
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that operates mainly in the air, such as aircraft, balloons, etc. This includes the entities when they are on the ground.

attribute.name: NVGMode
attribute.semantics: Describes whether air platform lighting is in covert or overt mode.

attribute.name: TrailingEffects
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the contrails or ionization trailing effects.

attribute.name: CanopyTroopDoor
attribute.semantics: Describes the state of the canopy/troop door.

attribute.name: LandingLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether landing lights are on or off.

attribute.name: NavigationLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether navigation lights are on or off.

attribute.name: AntiCollisionLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether Anti-Collision lights are on or off.

attribute.name: AfterburnerOn
attribute.semantics: Describes if the air platform is in afterburner.

attribute.name: LowerAntiCollisionLightOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the lower Anti-Collision light is on or off.

attribute.name: UpperAntiCollisionLightOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the upper Anti-Collision light is on or off.

attribute.name: AntiCollisionLightDayNight
attribute.semantics: Describes the day/night status of the Anti-Collision lights.

attribute.name: IsBlinking
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether any air platform lights are blinking or not.

attribute.name: FormationLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether formation lights are on or off.

attribute.name: LandingGearExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the landing gear is wholly retracted or extended.

attribute.name: CargoDoorsOpened
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the cargo doors (main door) are closed or open.

attribute.name: NavigationPositionBrightness
attribute.semantics: Describes the brightness of the navigation/position lights.

attribute.name: SpotSearchLight_1On
attribute.semantics: Describes whether spot/search light #1 is on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether interior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: ReverseThrustEngaged
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the air platform has engaged reverse thrust.

attribute.name: WeightOnWheels
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the air platform has weight on its main landing gear.

attribute.name: ADSBCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is equipped with Automatic Dependent Surveillance - Broadcast (ADS-B).

attribute.name: SlingLoadCarrierCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to carry a payload in a sling load. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify the current sling load status and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as payload).

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

attribute.name: LAIRCMCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is equipped with Large Aircraft Infrared Countermeasures (LAIRCM).

objectClass.name: AmphibiousVehicle
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that can operate both on the land and the sea.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons.

attribute.name: TrailingEffects
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the dust cloud or wake trailing effect.

attribute.name: PrimaryHatch

attribute.semantics: Describes whether head lights are on or off.

attribute.name: TailLightsOn

attribute.name: OccupantsSurrendered
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the vehicle occupants have surrendered.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.semantics: Describes whether running lights are on or off.

objectClass.name: Lifeform
objectClass.semantics: A living military platform (human or not).

attribute.semantics: Describes the visual appearance of the severity of any injury.

attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the life form is mounted/hoisted on another platform, such as a troop transport or helicopter hoist.

attribute.semantics: Describes the posture (position) of the life form.

attribute.name: IsSmokingCigarette
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the life form has a lit cigarette or not. The primary purpose is for IR signature generation, so it could be a cigar or other item.

attribute.name: WeaponImplement1
attribute.semantics: Describes the position of the life form's primary weapon/implement.

attribute.name: WeaponImplement2
attribute.semantics: Describes the position of the life form's secondary weapon/implement.

attribute.name: CamouflageType
attribute.semantics: Describes the camouflage color.

attribute.name: ConcealedStationary
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the life form is in a prepared concealed position.

attribute.name: ConcealedMovement
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the life form uses concealment during movement.

objectClass.name: NonHuman
objectClass.semantics: An animal or other non-human lifeform.

objectClass.name: CulturalFeature
objectClass.semantics: Engineering and natural effects such as craters, bridges, vehicle tracks, etc.

attribute.name: DamageArea
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged area.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: InternalHeatOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the internal heat is on or off.

attribute.name: ExteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the exterior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the interior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

objectClass.name: Munition
objectClass.semantics: A complete device charged with explosives, propellants, pyrotechnics, initiating composition, or nuclear, biological or chemical material for use in military operations, including demolitions.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeVaporEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke or vapor is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: IsEngineEmittingSmoke
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the engine is emitting smoke.

attribute.name: VaporTrailSize
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the vapor trail.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: LaunchFlashPresent
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the guided munition's launch flash is present.

attribute.name: PowerPlantOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the power plant is on or off.

attribute.name: CoverShroudStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of the cover or shroud.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

objectClass.name: Expendables
objectClass.semantics: Countermeasures devices that are dispensed from another entity. The devices may be active emitters or passive reflectors of energy.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: ParachuteStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of a flare's parachute.

attribute.name: FlareSmokeColor
attribute.semantics: Describes the color of a flare's light output or the color of smoke emanating from a smoke expendable.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: LaunchFlashPresent
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not launch flash is present.

attribute.name: FlareSmokeStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of a flare or smoke expendable.

attribute.name: PowerPlantOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the power plant is on or off.

attribute.name: SpotChaffStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of spot chaff.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

objectClass.name: Radio
objectClass.semantics: Electronic devices for the communication of both audio and data, operated by entities belonging to armed forces.

objectClass.name: Sensor
objectClass.semantics: Sensors and emitters, such as stand-alone radars, jammers, and detection systems, that are not part of another platform or system described by another Physical Entity, and are operated by armed forces.

attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual paint design.

attribute.name: MobilityKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of moving on its own power.

attribute.name: MissionKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of carrying out its mission (e.g., damaged antenna).

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: IsEngineEmittingSmoke
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the engine is emitting smoke.

attribute.name: TrailingEffects
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the trailing effects.

attribute.name: LightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the lights are on or off.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: AntennaRaised
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the antenna is raised or not.

attribute.name: CamouflageType
attribute.semantics: Describes the camouflage color.

attribute.name: ConcealedPosition
attribute.semantics: Describes the type of concealment.

attribute.name: PowerPlantOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the power plant is on or off.

attribute.name: TentExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the tent is extended.

attribute.name: BlackoutLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether blackout lights are on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether interior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

objectClass.name: Supplies
objectClass.semantics: Supplies other than munitions, such as fuel, food and personnel.

attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual paint design.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: ParachuteStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of a supply's parachute.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: DeployedStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the deployed status.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: AmmunitionSupplyCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of ammunition in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: FuelSupplyCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of fuel in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

objectClass.name: AggregateEntity
objectClass.semantics: A group of one or more separate objects that operate together as part of an organization. These objects may be discrete, may be other aggregate objects, or may be a mixture of both.

attribute.name: AggregateMarking
attribute.semantics: A unique marking or combination of characters used to distinguish the aggregate from other aggregates.

attribute.name: AggregateState
attribute.semantics: An indicator of the extent of association of objects form an operating group.

attribute.name: Dimensions
attribute.semantics: The size of the area covered by the units in the aggregate.

attribute.name: EntityIdentifiers
attribute.semantics: The identification of entities that are contained within the aggregate.

attribute.name: ForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the aggregate belongs to.

attribute.name: Formation
attribute.semantics: The category of positional arrangement of the entities within the aggregate.

attribute.name: SilentAggregates
attribute.semantics: The numbers and types, of silent aggregates contained in the aggregate. Silent aggregates are sub-aggregates that are in the aggregate, but that are not separately represented in the virtual world.

attribute.name: SilentEntities
attribute.semantics: The numbers and types, of silent entities in the aggregate. Silent entities are entities that are in the aggregate, but that are not separately represented in the virtual world.

attribute.name: SubAggregateIdentifiers
attribute.semantics: The identifications of aggregates represented in the virtual world that are contained in the aggregate.

attribute.name: VariableDatums
attribute.semantics: Extra data that describes the aggregate.

objectClass.name: EnvironmentalEntity
objectClass.semantics: An object which has physical extent but not necessarily fixed size and shape, such as meteorological effects such as clouds or smokes.

attribute.name: Density
attribute.semantics: Describes the density.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

objectClass.name: Minefield
objectClass.semantics: An area of ground or water containing mines laid with or without a pattern.

attribute.name: ActiveStatus
attribute.semantics: Specifies the active status of the minefield.

attribute.name: ForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies the force to which the minefield belongs.

attribute.name: Lane
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the minefield has an active lane.

attribute.name: MinefieldAppearanceType
attribute.semantics: Specifies the appearance information needed for displaying the symbology of the minefield.

attribute.name: MinefieldIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Uniquely identifies this minefield instance in association with the federate's site and application.

attribute.name: MinefieldLocation
attribute.semantics: Specifies the location of the center of the minefield.

attribute.name: MinefieldOrientation
attribute.semantics: Specifies the orientation of the minefield, with Euler angles.

attribute.name: MinefieldType
attribute.semantics: Specifies the minefield type.

attribute.name: MineTypes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the type of each mine contained within the minefield.

attribute.name: PerimeterPointCoordinates
attribute.semantics: Specifies the location of each perimeter point, relative to the minefield location.

attribute.name: ProtocolMode
attribute.semantics: Specifies the mode (Heartbeat or Query Response Protocol) being used to communicate data about the minefield.

attribute.name: State
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the minefield has been deactivated.

objectClass.name: EmbeddedSystem
objectClass.semantics: A base class used to associate components such as sensor and emitting systems with their parent entity object.

attribute.name: EntityIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The EntityIdentifier of the object which this embedded system is a part of.

attribute.name: HostObjectIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The RTI object instance ID of the object of which this embedded system is part of.

attribute.name: RelativePosition
attribute.semantics: The position of the embedded system, relative to the host object's position.

objectClass.name: MinefieldData
objectClass.semantics: The MinefieldData object class provides data about collections of mines within a minefield on an individual mine basis.

attribute.name: GroundBurialDepthOffset
attribute.semantics: Specifies the offset of the origin of the mine coordinate system with respect to the ground surface.

attribute.name: Fusing
attribute.semantics: Specifies the primary and secondary fuse and anti-handling device for each mine in a collection of mines.

attribute.name: MineEmplacementTime
attribute.semantics: Specifies the real-world (UTC) emplacement time of each mine in a collection of mines.

attribute.name: MineEntityIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies the mine entity identifier; the MineEntityIdentifier in conjunction with the MinefieldIdentifier form the unique identifier for each mine.

attribute.name: MinefieldIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies the minefield to which the mines belong.

attribute.name: MineLocation
attribute.semantics: Specifies the location of the mine relative to the minefield location for each mine in a collection of mines.

attribute.name: MineOrientation
attribute.semantics: Specifies the orientation of the center axis direction of fire of the mine, relative to the minefield Coordinate System for each mine in a collection of mines.

attribute.name: MineType
attribute.semantics: Specifies the type of mine for the collection of mines contained within the MinefieldData object.

attribute.name: NumberTripDetonationWires
attribute.semantics: Specifies the number of trip detonation wires that exist for each mine in a collection of mines.

attribute.name: NumberWireVertices
attribute.semantics: Specifies the number of vertices for each trip wire of each mine in a collection of mines.

attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.semantics: Specifies the camouflage scheme/color of the mine.

attribute.name: Reflectance
attribute.semantics: Specifies the local dielectric difference between the mine and the surrounding soil.

attribute.name: ScalarDetectionCoefficient
attribute.semantics: Specifies the coefficient to be utilized to insure proper correlation between detectors located on different simulation platforms.

attribute.name: SensorTypes
attribute.semantics: In QRP mode, specifies the requesting sensor types which were specified in the minefield query whereas in Heartbeat mode, specifies the sensor types that are being served by the minefield.

attribute.name: SnowBurialDepthOffset
attribute.semantics: Specifies the offset of the origin of the mine coordinate system with respect to the snow surface.

attribute.name: ThermalContrast
attribute.semantics: Specifies the temperature difference between the mine and the surround soil in degrees Centigrade.

attribute.name: WaterBurialDepthOffset
attribute.semantics: Specifies the offset of the origin of the mine coordinate system with respect to the water surface.

attribute.name: WireVertices
attribute.semantics: Specifies the locations of vertices in a trip wire.

objectClass.name: RadioTransmitter
objectClass.semantics: A device that sends out information encoded in electromagnetic waves in the radio frequency range.

attribute.name: AntennaPatternData
attribute.semantics: The radiation pattern of the radio's antenna.

attribute.name: CryptographicMode
attribute.semantics: The mode of the cryptographic system.

attribute.name: CryptoSystem
attribute.semantics: The type of cryptographic equipment in use.

attribute.name: EncryptionKeyIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the key used to encrypt the radio signals being transmitted. The transmitter and receiver should be considered to be using the same key if these numbers match.

attribute.name: Frequency
attribute.semantics: The center frequency of the radio transmissions.

attribute.name: FrequencyBandwidth
attribute.semantics: The bandpass of the radio transmissions.

attribute.name: FrequencyHopInUse
attribute.semantics: Whether the radio is using frequency hopping or not.

attribute.name: HighFidelityHAVEQUICKData
attribute.semantics: Additional information related to High Fidelity HAVE QUICK and SATURN radios.

attribute.name: Power
attribute.semantics: The EIRP when transmitting.

attribute.name: PseudoNoiseInUse
attribute.semantics: Whether the radio is using pseudo noise or not.

attribute.name: RadioAttachedIndicator
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the radio transmitter is attached to an entity or object.

attribute.name: RadioIndex
attribute.semantics: A number that uniquely identifies this radio from others on the host.

attribute.name: RadioInputSource
attribute.semantics: Specifies which position or data port provided the input for the transmission.

attribute.name: RadioSystemType
attribute.semantics: The type of radio transmitter.

attribute.name: RFModulationSystemParameters
attribute.semantics: Classification of the modulation system type and parameters.

attribute.name: RFModulationType
attribute.semantics: Classification of the modulation type.

attribute.name: StreamTag
attribute.semantics: A globally unique identifier for the associated audio stream.

attribute.name: TimeHopInUse
attribute.semantics: Whether the radio is using time hopping or not.

attribute.name: TransmitterOperationalStatus
attribute.semantics: The current operational state of the radio transmitter.

attribute.name: WorldLocation
attribute.semantics: The location of the antenna in the world coordinate system.

objectClass.name: RadioReceiver
objectClass.semantics: A device that converts incoming electromagnetic waves in the radio frequency range into information.

attribute.name: RadioAttachedIndicator
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the radio receiver is attached to an entity or object.

attribute.name: RadioIndex
attribute.semantics: A number that uniquely identifies this radio receiver from other receivers on the host object.

attribute.name: ReceivedPower
attribute.semantics: The radio frequency power received, after applying any propagation loss and antenna gain.

attribute.name: ReceivedTransmitterIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The object instance ID of the transmitter that generated the received radio signal.

attribute.name: ReceiverOperationalStatus
attribute.semantics: The operational state of the radio receiver.

objectClass.name: Designator
objectClass.semantics: A system used to designate or mark a location or object, such as a laser designator which supports a laser-guided weapon engagement.

attribute.name: CodeName
attribute.semantics: The code name of the designator system.

attribute.name: DesignatedObjectIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The object instance ID of the entity that is currently being designated (if any).

attribute.name: DesignatorCode
attribute.semantics: The designator code being used by the designating entity.

attribute.name: DesignatorEmissionWavelength
attribute.semantics: The wavelength of the designator system.

attribute.name: DesignatorOutputPower
attribute.semantics: The output power of the designator system.

attribute.name: DesignatorSpotLocation
attribute.semantics: The location, in the world coordinate system, of the designator spot.

attribute.name: DeadReckoningAlgorithm
attribute.semantics: Dead reckoning algorithm used by the issuing object.

attribute.name: RelativeSpotLocation
attribute.semantics: The location of the designator spot, relative to the object being designated (if any).

attribute.name: SpotLinearAccelerationVector
attribute.semantics: The rate of change in linear velocity of the designator spot over time.

objectClass.name: EmitterSystem
objectClass.semantics: A device that radiates an electromagnetic signal, such as a radar or jammer.

attribute.name: EmitterFunctionCode
attribute.semantics: The function of the emitter system.

attribute.name: EmitterType
attribute.semantics: The type of the emitter system.

attribute.name: EmitterIndex
attribute.semantics: A unique number, which uniquely identifies the emitter system from other on the same host entity.

attribute.name: EventIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The EventIdentifier is used by the generating federate to associate related events. The event number shall start at one at the beginning of the exercise, and be incremented by one for each event.

objectClass.name: IFFSystem
objectClass.semantics: Cooperative or noncooperative military IFF transponder and interrogator systems, including military Battlefield Target Identification Device (BTID) systems used on military vehicles, and cooperative civilian Air Traffic Control (ATC) radar beacon systems.

attribute.name: SystemType
attribute.semantics: General type of IFF/SSR system in use.

attribute.name: SystemName
attribute.semantics: Particular named type of the IFF/SSR system in use.

attribute.name: SystemDesignator
attribute.semantics: A unique decimal number assigned to this interrogator or transponder to distinguish it from multiple interrogators or transponders that are associated with the same entity.

attribute.name: InteractiveModeIsActive
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether or not the IFFSystem is currently operating in the Interactive Mode.

attribute.name: EventIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Used to associate related events.

attribute.name: SystemIsOn
attribute.semantics: Whether or not the system is on.

attribute.name: SystemMode
attribute.semantics: Mode of operation.

attribute.name: OperationalStatus
attribute.semantics: Whether the system is operational or whether it has experienced a system failure.

attribute.name: TestModeIsOn
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the IFF/SSR system has been placed in the equipment test mode.

attribute.name: EmissionsDataAvailable
attribute.semantics: Specifies if emissions data (DIS IFF PDU layer 2) is available for this IFF/SSR system. When set to True, then the EmissionsDataSpecificInformation, BeamAzimuthCenter, BeamAzimuthSweep, BeamElevationCenter, BeamElevationSweep, BeamSweepSync, and FundamentalParameterData attributes shall be generated.

attribute.name: EmissionsDataSpecificInformation
attribute.semantics: Layer-specific information for emissions data (layer number 2) that varies by SystemType.

attribute.name: BeamAzimuthCenter
attribute.semantics: The azimuth center of the IFF/SSR beam's scan volume relative to the IFF/SSR system.

attribute.name: BeamAzimuthSweep
attribute.semantics: The azimuth half-angle of the IFF/SSR beam's scan volume relative to the IFF/SSR system.

attribute.name: BeamElevationCenter
attribute.semantics: The elevation center of the IFF/SSR beam's scan volume relative to the IFF/SSR system.

attribute.name: BeamElevationSweep
attribute.semantics: The elevation half-angle of the IFF/SSR beam's scan volume relative to the IFF/SSR system.

attribute.name: BeamSweepSync
attribute.semantics: The percentage of time a scan is through its pattern from its origin.

attribute.name: FundamentalParameterData
attribute.semantics: The fundamental energy radiation characteristics of the IFF/SSR system.

attribute.name: AntennaLocationArray
attribute.semantics: The location of each auxiliary IFF/SSR antenna. An auxiliary IFF/SSR antenna is one that is in addition to the primary antenna whose location is contained in the EmbeddedSystem attribute RelativePosition.

attribute.name: DataCommunicationsSpecificInformation
attribute.semantics: Layer-specific information for data communications (layer number 5) that varies by SystemType.

objectClass.name: Interrogator
objectClass.semantics: A transmitter that emits a signal to trigger a response from an IFF/SSR system.

objectClass.name: Transponder
objectClass.semantics: A system that produces IFF/SSR responses when it receives an appropriate signal.

attribute.name: EmergencyOn
attribute.semantics: Set to True when the transponder has set Military Emergency to On.

attribute.name: IdentSquawkFlashOn
attribute.semantics: Set to True when the transponder has set the I/P to On. This is also referred to as the Special Process Indicator (SPI), "Squawk Flash" or "Squawk Ident".

attribute.name: UnmannedAircraftOn
attribute.semantics: Set to True when the transponder has set the Unmanned Aircraft reply to On.

objectClass.name: TCAS
objectClass.semantics: TCAS or ACAS transceiver system.

objectClass.name: UnderwaterAcousticsEmission
objectClass.semantics: The underwater acoustic classes used to communicate underwater acoustic active, intentional emissions and Passive Signature or Unintentional Emissions information. These emissions are used during undersea warfare scenarios to detect, classify, and track hostile forces when electronic warfare mechanisms are unavailable.

attribute.name: EventIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The generating federate uses the Event Identifier to associate related events. The event number begins at one at the beginning of the exercise and is incremented by one for each event.

objectClass.name: ActiveSonar
objectClass.semantics: Describes the state of an active sonar system.

attribute.name: AcousticName
attribute.semantics: Defines the type of sonar being represented.

attribute.name: FunctionCode
attribute.semantics: Declares the current primary use of the sonar. It may be used by simulations to infer intent.

attribute.name: AcousticsIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Unique identifier for the sonar on an entity, starts with 1.

objectClass.name: PropulsionNoise
objectClass.semantics: Describes the steady state component of unintended passive emissions that are normally associated with the power plant.

attribute.name: HullMaskerOn
attribute.semantics: Whether the hull masker silencing system is on.

attribute.name: PassiveParameterIndex
attribute.semantics: Database index to look up the entities acoustic signature.

attribute.name: PropulsionPlantConfiguration
attribute.semantics: The operating mode of the propulsion plant.

attribute.name: ShaftRateData
attribute.semantics: Information about each of the propulsion shafts associated with the entity. Shafts are ordered from port to starboard, when looking from the stern to the bow.

objectClass.name: AdditionalPassiveActivities
objectClass.semantics: Describes the steady state components of non-propulsion passive emissions such as those held in the Additional Narrowband Database (ANDB).

attribute.name: ActivityCode
attribute.semantics: Database index used to indicate the passive signature of the entity.

attribute.name: ActivityParameter
attribute.semantics: The current state of this activity.

attribute.name: IsSilent
attribute.semantics: Used to silence an additional passive activity without destroying this object.

objectClass.name: EnvironmentObject
objectClass.semantics: A base class of environment point, linear, or areal object classes.

attribute.name: ObjectIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies this EnvironmentObject instance (point, linear or areal).

attribute.name: ReferencedObjectIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies the Synthetic Environment object instance to which this EnvironmentObject instance is associated.

attribute.name: ForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies the force that created or modified this EnvironmentObject instance.

attribute.name: ObjectType
attribute.semantics: Identifies the type of this EnvironmentObject instance.

objectClass.name: ArealObject
objectClass.semantics: A synthetic environment object that is geometrically anchored to the terrain with a set of three or more points, which comes to a closure.

attribute.name: PointsData
attribute.semantics: Specifies the physical location (a collection of points, in the world coordinate system) of the object.

attribute.name: PercentComplete
attribute.semantics: Specifies the percent completion of the object.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Specifies the damaged appearance of the object.

attribute.name: Predistributed
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object was created before the start of the exercise.

attribute.name: State
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object has been deactivated (it has ceased to exist in the synthetic environment).

attribute.name: IsSmoking
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object is smoking (creating a smoke plume).

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether the object is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: IEDPresent
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether the object has or contains an IED.

objectClass.name: OtherArealObject
objectClass.semantics: Areal objects other than Minefield objects.

objectClass.name: MinefieldObject
objectClass.semantics: A mine, mine weapon, mine row, mine strip, mine lane, mine marker or minefield, defined as an areal environment object.

attribute.name: BreachState
attribute.semantics: Specifies the breached appearance of the minefield object.

attribute.name: MineCount
attribute.semantics: Specifies the number of mines in the minefield.

objectClass.name: LinearObject
objectClass.semantics: A synthetic environment object that has size and an orientation and is geometrically anchored to the terrain with one point.

objectClass.name: BreachableLinearObject
objectClass.semantics: A linear object that can be breached.

attribute.name: SegmentRecords
attribute.semantics: Specifies a breachable linear object.

objectClass.name: BreachObject
objectClass.semantics: A breach linear object.

attribute.name: SegmentRecords
attribute.semantics: Specifies a breach linear object.

objectClass.name: ExhaustSmokeObject
objectClass.semantics: An exhaust smoke linear object.

attribute.name: SegmentRecords
attribute.semantics: Specifies an exhaust smoke linear object.

objectClass.name: OtherLinearObject
objectClass.semantics: Linear objects other than BreachableLinear, Breach, ExhaustSmoke, or MinefieldLaneMarker objects.

objectClass.name: SpeedBumpObject
objectClass.semantics: A speed bump object.

attribute.name: SegmentRecords
attribute.semantics: Specifies a speed bump object.

objectClass.name: WireObject
objectClass.semantics: A wire object.

attribute.name: SegmentRecords
attribute.semantics: Specifies a wire object.

objectClass.name: MinefieldLaneMarkerObject
objectClass.semantics: A minefield lane marker showing a cleared lane through a specific minefield, defined as a linear object.

attribute.name: SegmentRecords
attribute.semantics: Specifies a minefield lane marker showing a cleared lane through a minefield.

objectClass.name: PointObject
objectClass.semantics: A synthetic environment object that is geometrically anchored to the terrain with a single point.

attribute.name: Location
attribute.semantics: Specifies the physical location of the object in the world coordinate system.

attribute.name: Orientation
attribute.semantics: Specifies the angles of rotation around the coordinate axis between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes ; these are calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles, specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the world coordinate system to the object coordinate system.

attribute.name: PercentComplete
attribute.semantics: Specifies the percent completion of the object.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Specifies the damaged appearance of the object instance.

attribute.name: Predistributed
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object was created before the start of the exercise.

attribute.name: State
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object has been deactivated (it has ceased to exist in the synthetic environment).

attribute.name: IsSmoking
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object is smoking (creating a smoke plume).

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether the object is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: IEDPresent
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether the object has or contains an IED.

objectClass.name: BreachablePointObject
objectClass.semantics: A point object that can be breached.

attribute.name: BreachState
attribute.semantics: Specifies the breached appearance of the object.

objectClass.name: BridgeObject
objectClass.semantics: A stationary bridge, AVLB object.

objectClass.name: BuildingRubbleObject
objectClass.semantics: A building rubble object.

objectClass.name: BurstPointObject
objectClass.semantics: A burst point object.

attribute.name: OpacityPercent
attribute.semantics: Specifies the opacity of the smoke.

attribute.name: Size
attribute.semantics: Specifies the radius of the cylinder approximating an individual smoke burst ; for multiple bursts, the center bottom of each cylinder is calculated based on the model used to represent the multiple bursts.

attribute.name: Height
attribute.semantics: Specifies the height of the cylinder approximating an individual smoke burst ; for multiple bursts, the center bottom of each cylinder is calculated based on the model used to represent the multiple bursts.

attribute.name: NumberOfBursts
attribute.semantics: Specifies the number of bursts in the instance of tactical smoke.

attribute.name: ChemicalType
attribute.semantics: Specifies the chemical content of the smoke.

objectClass.name: CraterObject
objectClass.semantics: A pit, depression, or cavity formed in the surface of the earth by an explosion. The depression's shape can range from saucer to conical, depending largely on the depth of burst.

attribute.name: Diameter
attribute.semantics: Specifies the diameter of the crater in meters, where the center of the crater is at the point object location.

attribute.name: Depth
attribute.semantics: Specifies the depth of the crater in centimeters.

attribute.name: Height
attribute.semantics: Specifies the height of the crater in centimeters.

attribute.name: BreachState
attribute.semantics: Specifies the breached appearance of the object.

objectClass.name: DisturbedEarthObject
objectClass.semantics: A disturbed earth / road object.

attribute.name: Diameter
attribute.semantics: Describes the diameter in decimeters.

attribute.name: Height
attribute.semantics: Describes the height in centimeters.

attribute.name: Contrast
attribute.semantics: Describes indicating 16 levels of contrast (low to high) distinguishing variation of object from surrounding surface.

objectClass.name: OtherPointObject
objectClass.semantics: Point objects other than Breachable, Bridge, BuildingRubble, Burst, Crater, DisturbedEarth, Pothole, RibbonBridge, Structure, Tree objects.

objectClass.name: PotholeObject
objectClass.semantics: A pothole object.

attribute.name: Diameter
attribute.semantics: Describes the diameter in decimeters.

attribute.name: Depth
attribute.semantics: Describes the depth in centimeters.

objectClass.name: RibbonBridgeObject
objectClass.semantics: A ribbon bridge object.

attribute.name: NumberOfSegments
attribute.semantics: Specifies the number of segments composing the ribbon bridge.

objectClass.name: StructureObject
objectClass.semantics: A building structure object.

attribute.name: Color
attribute.semantics: Describes the color of the building or structure.

attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual paint design.

attribute.name: IsApertureOpen
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the aperture (e.g., tent) is open or closed.

objectClass.name: TreeObject
objectClass.semantics: A tree object.

attribute.name: Season
attribute.semantics: Describes the visually represented season.

attribute.name: LeafCoverage
attribute.semantics: Describes the leaf coverage.

objectClass.name: EnvironmentProcess
objectClass.semantics: An object class used to communicate information about environmental processes and effects.

attribute.name: ProcessIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies which process issued the environmental process update.

attribute.name: Type
attribute.semantics: Identifies the environmental process type.

attribute.name: ModelType
attribute.semantics: Identifies the model used for generating this environmental process update.

attribute.name: IsActive
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether the environmental process is active or not.

attribute.name: SequenceNumber
attribute.semantics: Optional, used to support update sequencing. If not used, set to EP_NO_SEQUENCE (fixed value: FFFF (H)); when used, set to zero for each exercise and incremented by one for each update sent.

attribute.name: EnvironmentRecData
attribute.semantics: Specifies environment records.

objectClass.name: GriddedData
objectClass.semantics: An object class used to depict global, spatially varying environmental effects.

attribute.name: GridIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Identifies the environmental simulation application.

attribute.name: CoordinateSystem
attribute.semantics: Specifies the coordinate system used to locate the data grid.

attribute.name: ConstantGrid
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether the grid axes remain constant for the life of the data grid.

attribute.name: EnvironmentType
attribute.semantics: Identifies the type of environmental entity being described.

attribute.name: Orientation
attribute.semantics: Specifies the orientation of the data grid, with Euler angles.

attribute.name: SampleTime
attribute.semantics: Specifies the valid time of the environmental data sample.

attribute.name: TotalValues
attribute.semantics: Specifies the number of data values that make up this grid.

attribute.name: VectorDimension
attribute.semantics: Specifies the number of data values at each grid point ; VectorDimension shall be one for scalar data, and shall be greater than one when multiple enumerated environmental data values are sent for each grid point (e.g. u, v, w wind components have VectorDimension = 3).

attribute.name: GridAxisInfo
attribute.semantics: Specifies information on grid axes used to define the data grid (e.g. three grid axes for an x, y, z coordinate system).

attribute.name: GridDataInfo
attribute.semantics: Specifies information on grid data representations.

objectClass.name: EmitterBeam
objectClass.semantics: A sector of concentrated energy from a device that radiates an electromagnetic signal.

attribute.name: BeamAzimuthCenter
attribute.semantics: The azimuth center of the emitter beam's scan volume relative to the emitter system.

attribute.name: BeamAzimuthSweep
attribute.semantics: The azimuth half-angle of the emitter beam's scan volume relative to the emitter system.

attribute.name: BeamElevationCenter
attribute.semantics: The elevation center of the emitter beam's scan volume relative to the emitter system.

attribute.name: BeamElevationSweep
attribute.semantics: The elevation half-angle of the emitter beam's scan volume relative to the emitter system.

attribute.name: BeamFunctionCode
attribute.semantics: The function of the emitter beam.

attribute.name: BeamIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the emitter beam (must be unique on the emitter system).

attribute.name: BeamParameterIndex
attribute.semantics: The index, into the federation specific emissions database, of the current operating mode of the emitter beam.

attribute.name: EffectiveRadiatedPower
attribute.semantics: The effective radiated power for the emission (in the direction of the strongest beam). For a radar or a noise jammer, this attribute shall represent the peak ERP.

attribute.name: EmissionFrequency
attribute.semantics: The center frequency of the emitter beam.

attribute.name: EmitterSystemIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the emitter system that is generating this emitter beam.

attribute.name: EventIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The EventIdentifier is used by the generating federate to associate related events. The event number shall start at one at the beginning of the exercise, and be incremented by one for each event.

attribute.name: FrequencyRange
attribute.semantics: The bandwidth of the frequencies covered by the emitter beam.

attribute.name: PulseRepetitionFrequency
attribute.semantics: The Pulse Repetition Frequency of the emitter beam.

attribute.name: PulseWidth
attribute.semantics: The pulse width of the emitter beam.

attribute.name: SweepSynch
attribute.semantics: The percentage of time a scan is through its pattern from its origin.

objectClass.name: RadarBeam
objectClass.semantics: A sector of concentrated energy from a device that radiates an electromagnetic signal.

attribute.name: HighDensityTrack
attribute.semantics: When set to Selected (1), the receiving simulation can assume that all targets that are in the scan pattern of the radar beam are being tracked.

attribute.name: TrackObjectIdentifiers
attribute.semantics: Identification of the entities being tracked.

attribute.name: BlankingSectors
attribute.semantics: Information about the radar beam's blanking sectors.

objectClass.name: JammerBeam
objectClass.semantics: An emitter beam that is designed to jam or otherwise interfere or confuse another emitter system.

attribute.name: JammingModeSequence
attribute.semantics: The jamming mode technique or series of techniques being applied.

attribute.name: JammedObjectIdentifiers
attribute.semantics: Identification of the emitter beams being jammed.

attribute.name: HighDensityJam
attribute.semantics: When set to Selected (1), the receiving simulation can assume that all emitter beams that are in the scan pattern of the jammer beam are being jammed.

attribute.name: AngleDeceptionData
attribute.semantics: Information about angle deception jamming.

attribute.name: FalseTargetsData
attribute.semantics: Information about false targets jamming.

objectClass.name: IFFData
objectClass.semantics: Data applicable to distinct IFF/SSR system capabilities.

attribute.name: IFFSystemIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the IFFSystem object to which the IFF/SSR capability is composed.

attribute.name: EventIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Used to associate related events.

attribute.name: ReportingSimulation
attribute.semantics: The simulation publishing this IFF data.

objectClass.name: Mode1
objectClass.semantics: Mode 1 data applicable to both IFF transponders and IFF interrogators.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 1 is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 1 is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 1 is malfunctioning.

objectClass.name: Mode1Interrogator
objectClass.semantics: IFF interrogator Mode 1 capability.

objectClass.name: Mode1Transponder
objectClass.semantics: IFF transponder Mode 1 capability.

attribute.name: Code
attribute.semantics: Mode 1 code. For Mark X/XII systems, two octal values in the range 00 to 73 with the first digit in the range 0 to 7 and the second digit in the range 0 to 3 reading left to right. The first (left) digit is Code Element 2 (A) and occupies bits 3 to 5, and the second (right) digit is Code Element 1 (B) and occupies bits 0 to 2. Mark XIIA systems may employ extended Mode 1 codes, four octal values in the range 0000 to 7777 (as per Mode 2 and Mode 3/A codes). The attribute ExtendedCodeIsSet indicates whether or not an extended code has been set. If an extended Mode 1 code has been set, Mark X/XII interrogators need to extract bits 9-11 (Code Element A) and bits 6-7 (Code Element B).

attribute.name: ExtendedCodeIsSet
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mark XIIA Enhanced Mode 1 is on.

objectClass.name: Mode2
objectClass.semantics: Mode 2 data applicable to both IFF transponders and IFF interrogators.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 2 is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 2 is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 2 is malfunctioning.

objectClass.name: Mode2Interrogator
objectClass.semantics: IFF interrogator Mode 2 capability.

objectClass.name: Mode2Transponder
objectClass.semantics: IFF transponder Mode 2 capability.

attribute.name: Code
attribute.semantics: Mode 2 code, four octal values in the range 0000 to 7777. The first (left-most) digit is Code Element 4 (A) and occupies bits 9 to 11, followed by Code Element 3 (B) in bits 6 to 8, Code Element 2 (C) in bits 3 to 5, and the last (right-most) digit is Code Element 1 (D) and occupies bits 0 to 2.

objectClass.name: Mode3A
objectClass.semantics: Mode 3/A data applicable to IFF/SSR transponders and IFF/SSR interrogators.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 3/A is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 3/A is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 3/A is malfunctioning.

objectClass.name: Mode3AInterrogator
objectClass.semantics: IFF/SSR interrogator Mode 3/A capability.

objectClass.name: Mode3ATransponder
objectClass.semantics: IFF/SSR transponder Mode 3/A capability.

attribute.name: Code
attribute.semantics: Mode 3/A code, four octal values in the range 0000 to 7777. The first (left-most) digit is Code Element 4 (A) and occupies bits 9 to 11, followed by Code Element 3 (B) in bits 6 to 8, Code Element 2 (C) in bits 3 to 5, and the last (right-most) digit is Code Element 1 (D) and occupies bits 0 to 2.

objectClass.name: Mode4
objectClass.semantics: Mode 4 data applicable to both IFF transponders and IFF interrogators.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 4 is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 4 is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 4 is malfunctioning.

attribute.name: PseudoCryptoCodeAAvailable
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether a Mode 4 pseudo crypto code (A) value is available in the attribute PseudoCryptoCodeA or that Challenge or Reply is to be used instead. If also a code B is available, the attribute PseudoCryptoCodeActive indicates which code is to be used.

attribute.name: PseudoCryptoCodeA
attribute.semantics: Mode 4 pseudo crypto code (A) in the range 0 to 4094 decimal.

attribute.name: PseudoCryptoCodeBAvailable
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether or not a Mode 4 pseudo crypto code B value is available in the attribute PseudoCryptoCodeB. If available, PseudoCryptoCodeA must also be set to a valid value, PseudoCryptoCodeAAvailable to True, and PseudoCryptoCodeActive to indicate which code is to be used. If not, the PseudoCryptoCodeA is to be used, if available, or the Challenge or Reply attribute.

attribute.name: PseudoCryptoCodeB
attribute.semantics: Mode 4 pseudo crypto code B in the range 0 to 4094 decimal.

attribute.name: PseudoCryptoCodeActive
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether Mode 4 Code A or Code B is active, or neither.

objectClass.name: Mode4Interrogator
objectClass.semantics: IFF interrogator Mode 4 capability.

attribute.name: Challenge
attribute.semantics: Indicates the validity of a Mode 4 interrogation. This attribute shall be set to Valid (1) or Invalid (2).

objectClass.name: Mode4Transponder
objectClass.semantics: IFF transponder Mode 4 capability.

attribute.name: Reply
attribute.semantics: Indicates the reply that would be received from a Mode 4 transponder by a Mode 4 interrogator. This attribute shall be set to Valid (1), Invalid (2), or No Response (3). The Unable to Verify (4) reply is optional.

objectClass.name: Mode5
objectClass.semantics: Mode 5 data applicable to both IFF transponders and IFF interrogators.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 5 is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 5 is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode 5 is malfunctioning.

attribute.name: PseudoCryptoCodeAvailable
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether a Mode 5 pseudo crypto code value is available in the attribute PseudoCryptoCode or that Reply is to be used instead.

attribute.name: PseudoCryptoCode
attribute.semantics: Mode 5 pseudo crypto code in the range 0 to 4094 decimal.

attribute.name: MessageFormatsCapable
attribute.semantics: The included message formats that this Mode 5 interrogator or transponder is capable of supporting and could be in a Mode 5 interrogation or in a reply to a Mode 5 interrogation.

attribute.name: Mission
attribute.semantics: The IFF mission of this Mode 5 interrogator or transponder. (Some of the enumerators are applicable to either a transponder or an interrogator.)

attribute.name: SpecificInformation
attribute.semantics: Specific information for Mode 5 data (DIS IFF PDU layer 3) that varies by System Type.

objectClass.name: Mode5Interrogator
objectClass.semantics: IFF interrogator Mode 5 capability.

objectClass.name: Mode5Transponder
objectClass.semantics: IFF transponder Mode 5 capability.

attribute.name: Reply
attribute.semantics: The validity of a reply that would be transmitted by a Mode 5 transponder if interrogated. The following enumerators shall be capable of being set: No Response (0), Valid (1), and Invalid (2). The Unable to Verify (3) value is optional.

attribute.name: LevelSelection
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether Mode 5 Level 1 (0) or Mode 5 Level 2 (1) is currently selected for this Mode 5 transponder. (The Level 2 selection includes both Level 1 and Level 2 message formats.)

attribute.name: SquitterIsOn
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether Mode 5 squitter is On (1) or Off (0).

attribute.name: Level2SquitterStatus
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether Mode 5 Level 2 squitter is Disabled (0) or Enabled (1).

attribute.name: PlatformType
attribute.semantics: Indicates the type of platform (air or ground) that is associated with this Mode 5 transponder.

attribute.name: PlatformIdentificationNumber
attribute.semantics: The Platform Identification Number (PIN) that uniquely identifies the platform carrying this Mode 5 transponder. The PIN shall be a number in the range 00 000 octal to 37 777 octal.

attribute.name: NationalOrigin
attribute.semantics: The national origin, the country that owns the platform carrying a Mode 5 transponder.

attribute.name: FigureOfMerit
attribute.semantics: The Figure of Merit, a number in the range of 0 to 31 decimal.

attribute.name: AntennaSelection
attribute.semantics: Indicate the present Mode 5 transponder antenna selection and shall be set to either No Statement (0) if the Mode 5 antenna position is not available or to Top (1), Bottom (2), or Diversity (3).

attribute.name: LineTestIsEnabled
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether a line test is in progress.

attribute.name: NavigationSource
attribute.semantics: The Navigation source.

attribute.name: LocationDataIsPresent
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the source of Mode 5 latitude, longitude, and altitude information is present in the TransponderLocation attribute (1), or is to be computed locally (0).

attribute.name: TransponderLocation
attribute.semantics: Real-time location and altitude information transmitted by the transponder.

attribute.name: LocationErrorsDataPresence
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether there are location errors associated with Mode 5 latitude, longitude, or altitude present in the TransponderLocationError attribute (1), or No Location Errors are provided (0).

attribute.name: TransponderLocationError
attribute.semantics: The specification of errors in location and altitude information transmitted by the transponder.

objectClass.name: ModeC
objectClass.semantics: Mode C data applicable to both IFF/SSR transponders and IFF/SSR interrogators.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode C is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode C is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode C is malfunctioning.

objectClass.name: ModeCInterrogator
objectClass.semantics: IFF/SSR interrogator Mode C capability.

objectClass.name: ModeCTransponder
objectClass.semantics: IFF/SSR transponder Mode C capability.

attribute.name: AltitudeAvailable
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the actual Mode C altitude is available in the attribute Altitude or is to be derived from entity truth data.

attribute.name: Altitude
attribute.semantics: The actual Mode C altitude.

objectClass.name: ModeS
objectClass.semantics: Mode S data applicable to both IFF/SSR transponders and IFF/SSR interrogators.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode S is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode S is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Mode S is malfunctioning.

attribute.name: LevelsPresent
attribute.semantics: Indicates the Mode S levels present. All levels that would be able to be responded to for a Mode S interrogation shall be set.

attribute.name: SpecificInformation
attribute.semantics: Specific information for Mode S data (DIS IFF PDU layer 4) that varies by System Type.

objectClass.name: ModeSInterrogator
objectClass.semantics: IFF/SSR interrogator Mode S capability.

attribute.name: InterrogatorIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Mode S Interrogator Code (IC) information.

attribute.name: TransmitState
attribute.semantics: The state of the Mode S interrogator. This field shall be set to No Statement (0) when the Mode S interrogator simulation is operating in the Regeneration Mode. It may be set to other values if operating in the Interactive Mode.

objectClass.name: ModeSTransponder
objectClass.semantics: IFF/SSR transponder Mode S capability.

attribute.name: AircraftAddress
attribute.semantics: A unique ICAO Mode S Aircraft Address. When a military aircraft has both a permanent and an operational Mode S Aircraft Address, only one address will be active at a time. The active aircraft address shall be included in this attribute.

attribute.name: AircraftIdentificationType
attribute.semantics: The aircraft identification type.

attribute.name: AircraftIdentification
attribute.semantics: The International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) flight identity of the aircraft, either the flight ID (i.e., call sign) or the registration number (also referred to as the tail number) of the aircraft. This attribute shall consist of an eight-element American Standard Code for Information Interchange (ASCII) character string consisting of the letters A to Z and the numbers 0 to 9. An aircraft identification may be less than eight characters. This string shall begin with the left-most character located at the lowest index. Unused characters shall be indicated by Null (0) values.

attribute.name: SquitterIsOn
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the squitter is On (1) or Off (0).

attribute.name: SquitterType
attribute.semantics: Indicates the type of Mode S squitter.

attribute.name: CapabilityReport
attribute.semantics: The Mode S Transponder Capability Report. The numeric values are from Annex 10 to ICAO Vol. IV, para 3.1.2.5.2.2.1, except for No Statement. If no specific capability is indicated, this field shall be set to No Statement (255).

attribute.name: AircraftPresentDomain
attribute.semantics: Indicates the present domain of the aircraft. Surface means on a water platform surface such as a ship deck or on the water surface directly (e.g., pontoon-equipped aircraft). This field is referred to as Flight Status in ICAO Publications.

attribute.name: AltitudeAvailable
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the actual Mode S altitude is available in the attribute Altitude or is to be derived from entity truth data.

attribute.name: Altitude
attribute.semantics: The actual Mode S altitude as determined by the Mode S transponder model, represented as a binary coded altitude referenced to -1000 feet. All altitudes greater than 50 175 feet shall be reported with 100-foot resolution. A receiving simulation is not required to process an actual Mode S altitude value by this standard and may always compute it from the entity truth altitude.

attribute.name: SquitterRecordSource
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the squitter records are only present in the Squitter*Report attributes (0) or are also included in the GroundInitiatedCommBData array attribute (1).

attribute.name: AirbornePositionReportDataIsPresent
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether there is a Squitter Airborne Position Report IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the SquitterAirbornePositionReport attribute.

attribute.name: SquitterAirbornePositionReport
attribute.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Airborne Position Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards.

attribute.name: AirborneVelocityReportDataIsPresent
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether there is a Squitter Airborne Velocity Report IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the SquitterAirborneVelocityReport attribute.

attribute.name: SquitterAirborneVelocityReport
attribute.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Airborne Velocity Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards.

attribute.name: SurfacePositionReportDataIsPresent
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether there is a Squitter Surface Position Report IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the SquitterSurfacePositionReport attribute.

attribute.name: SquitterSurfacePositionReport
attribute.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Surface Position Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards. This report is transmitted when an aircraft is on the ground or aboard ship.

attribute.name: IdentificationReportDataIsPresent
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether there is a Squitter Identification Report IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the SquitterIdentificationReport attribute.

attribute.name: SquitterIdentificationReport
attribute.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Identification Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards.

attribute.name: EventDrivenReportDataIsPresent
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether there is a Squitter Event-Driven Report IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the SquitterEventDrivenReport attribute.

attribute.name: SquitterEventDrivenReport
attribute.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Event-Driven Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards.

attribute.name: TransponderLocation
attribute.semantics: Real-time location and altitude information transmitted by the transponder.

attribute.name: GroundInitiatedCommBData
attribute.semantics: Variable data related to Ground-Initiated Comm-B (GICB) data communications.

attribute.name: DAPSource
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether IFF Data records are present in the DAPData array attribute that can be used as the source for Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameters (DAPs).

attribute.name: DAPData
attribute.semantics: IFF Data records representing Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameters (DAPs).

attribute.name: LocationErrorsDataPresence
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether there are location errors associated with Mode S latitude, longitude, or altitude present in the TransponderLocationError attribute (1), or No Location Errors are provided (0).

attribute.name: TransponderLocationError
attribute.semantics: The specification of errors in location and altitude information transmitted by the transponder.

objectClass.name: TCASData
objectClass.semantics: TCAS/ACAS capability, applicable to IFF/SSR transponders, IFF/SSR interrogators, and TCAS/ACAS systems.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the TCAS/ACAS system is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the TCAS/ACAS system is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the TCAS/ACAS system is malfunctioning.

attribute.name: TCAS_I_II_Type
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether a TCAS system is a TCAS I (0) or TCAS II (1) system when the TCAS/ACAS Type field does not indicate a TCAS III system. If the TCAS/ACAS Type field contains a nonzero value, then this field shall be set to No Statement (0).

attribute.name: BasicAdvancedIndicator
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether this TCACS/ACAS object contains Basic (0) or Advanced (1) data. Basic data is the minimum required to be set by any TCAS/ACAS capable interrogator or transponder. Advanced data means that the record contains additional data fields for a higher fidelity simulation of TCAS/ACAS capabilities. The attributes TCAS_ACASType, TCAS_ACASIndicator, and SoftwareVersion are not applicable to Basic and required for Advanced data.

attribute.name: TCAS_ACASType
attribute.semantics: Indicates the type of TCAS/ACAS system other than a TCAS I or II system, if known, or shall be set to No Statement (0) if not known.

attribute.name: TCAS_ACASIndicator
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the record applies to a TCAS (0) or an ACAS (1) system.

attribute.name: SoftwareVersion
attribute.semantics: Indicates the software version of the TCAS/ACAS system if known or set to No Statement (0) if not known.

objectClass.name: Soviet
objectClass.semantics: Data applicable to both Soviet IFF transponders and Soviet IFF interrogators.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the Soviet mode is on.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the Soviet mode is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not Soviet mode is malfunctioning.

objectClass.name: SovietInterrogator
objectClass.semantics: IFF interrogator Soviet capability.

objectClass.name: SovietTransponder
objectClass.semantics: IFF transponder Soviet capability.

objectClass.name: RRB
objectClass.semantics: Reply Receiver 'B' (RRB) transponder capability.

attribute.name: IsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the RRB transponder is set to reply.

attribute.name: IsDamaged
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the RRB system is damaged.

attribute.name: IsMalfunctioning
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the RRB system is malfunctioning.

attribute.name: Code
attribute.semantics: RRB Code (range 0-16).

attribute.name: PowerReductionIsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not power reduction is on.

attribute.name: RadarEnhancementIsOn
attribute.semantics: Specifies whether or not the radar enhancement is on.

objectClass.name: ActiveSonarBeam
objectClass.semantics: A sector of concentrated acoustic energy from an active sonar device.

attribute.name: ActiveEmissionParameterIndex
attribute.semantics: An index into the database of active (intentional) underwater acoustics emissions.

attribute.name: ActiveSonarIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The RTI ID of the ActiveSonar emitting this beam.

attribute.name: AzimuthBeamwidth
attribute.semantics: The horizontal width of the main beam (as opposed to any side lobes) measured from beam center to the 3 dB down point. Omnidirectional beams shall have a beam width of 0 radians.

attribute.name: AzimuthCenter
attribute.semantics: The center azimuthal bearing of the main beam (as opposed to side lobes) in relation to the own ship heading, clockwise positive. Omnidirection beams shall have an azimuthal center of 0 radians.

attribute.name: BeamIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the active sonar beam, which must be unique on the active sonar system.

attribute.name: ElevationBeamwidth
attribute.semantics: Vertical angle from beam center to 3db down point. O is omnidirectional.

attribute.name: ElevationCenter
attribute.semantics: The angle of axis of the beam center to the horizontal plane. Positive upward.

attribute.name: EventIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Used to associate changes to the beam with its ActiveSonar.

attribute.name: ScanPattern
attribute.semantics: The pattern that describes the angular movement of the sonar beam during its sweep.

objectClass.name: DirectedEnergyFire
objectClass.semantics: Communicates information associated with the firing of a DE weapon.

attribute.name: FiringObjectIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The object instance ID of the firing entity.

attribute.name: EventIdentifier
attribute.semantics: An ID, generated by the issuing federate, used to associate to related fire and detonation events.

attribute.name: MunitionType
