attribute.semantics: The munition type enumeration for the DE weapon beam.

attribute.name: ShotStartTime
attribute.semantics: The simulation time at start of the shot.

attribute.name: CumulativeShotTime
attribute.semantics: The current cumulative duration of the shot, expressed in units of seconds.

attribute.name: RelativeFiringLocation
attribute.semantics: The location of the DE weapon aperture/emitter in coordinates relative to the firing entity.

attribute.name: ApertureDiameter
attribute.semantics: The beam diameter at the aperture/emitter.

attribute.name: Wavelength
attribute.semantics: The emissions wavelength.

attribute.name: PulseRepetitionFrequency
attribute.semantics: The current pulse repetition frequency.

attribute.name: PulseWidth
attribute.semantics: The pulse width emissions.

attribute.name: PulseShape
attribute.semantics: The pulse shape.

attribute.name: Flags
attribute.semantics: Flags indicating status information.

attribute.name: AreaAimpointData
attribute.semantics: Information about the directed energy beam area targeting data.

attribute.name: PrecisionAimpointData
attribute.semantics: Information about the directed energy beam precise targeting data.

objectClass.name: HLAmanager
objectClass.semantics: This object class is the root class of all MOM object classes

objectClass.name: HLAfederate
objectClass.semantics: This object class shall contain RTI state variables relating to a joined federate. The RTI shall publish it and shall register one object instance for each joined federate in a federation. Dynamic attributes that shall be contained in an object instance shall be updated periodically, where the period should be determined by an interaction of the class HLAmanager. HLAfederate.HLAadjust.HLAsetTiming. If this value is never set or is set to zero, no periodic up-date shall be performed by the RTI.

attribute.name: HLAfederateHandle
attribute.semantics: Handle of the joined federate returned by a Join Federation Execution service invocation

attribute.name: HLAfederateType
attribute.semantics: Type of the joined federate specified by the joined federate when it joined the federation

attribute.name: HLAfederateHost
attribute.semantics: Host name of the computer on which the joined federate is executing

attribute.name: HLARTIversion
attribute.semantics: Version of the RTI software being used

attribute.name: HLAFDDID
attribute.semantics: Identifier associated with the FDD data used by the joined federate

attribute.name: HLAtimeConstrained
attribute.semantics: Whether the time advance of the joined federate is constrained by other joined federates

attribute.name: HLAtimeRegulating
attribute.semantics: Whether the joined federate influences the time advancement of other joined federates

attribute.name: HLAasynchronousDelivery
attribute.semantics: Whether the RTI shall deliver receive-order messages to the joined federate while the joined federate's time manager state is not Time Advancing (only matters if the joined federate is time-constrained)

attribute.name: HLAfederateState
attribute.semantics: State of the joined federate

attribute.name: HLAtimeManagerState
attribute.semantics: State of the joined federate's time manager

attribute.name: HLAlogicalTime
attribute.semantics: Joined federate's logical time. Initial value of this information is initial value of time of the Time Representation Abstract datatype (TRADT).

attribute.name: HLAlookahead
attribute.semantics: Minimum duration into the future that a TSO message will be scheduled. The value shall not be defined if the joined federate is not time-regulating)

attribute.name: HLAGALT
attribute.semantics: Joined federate's Greatest Available Logical Time (GALT). The value shall not be defined if GALT is not defined for the joined federate.

attribute.name: HLALITS
attribute.semantics: Joined federate's Least Incoming Time Stamp (LITS). The value shall not be defined if LITS is not defined for the joined federate.

attribute.name: HLAROlength
attribute.semantics: Number of RO messages queued for delivery to the joined federate.

attribute.name: HLATSOlength
attribute.semantics: Number of TSO messages queued for delivery to the joined federate

attribute.name: HLAreflectionsReceived
attribute.semantics: Total number of reflections received by the joined federate.

attribute.name: HLAupdatesSent
attribute.semantics: Total number of updates sent by the joined federate

attribute.name: HLAinteractionsReceived
attribute.semantics: Total number of interactions received by the joined federate.

attribute.name: HLAinteractionsSent
attribute.semantics: Total number of interactions sent by the joined federate. This information shall reflect related DDM usage.

attribute.name: HLAobjectInstancesThatCanBeDeleted
attribute.semantics: Total number of object instances whose HLAprivilegeToDeleteObject attribute is owned by the joined federate

attribute.name: HLAobjectInstancesUpdated
attribute.semantics: Total number of object instances for which the joined federate has invoked the Update Attribute Values service.

attribute.name: HLAobjectInstancesReflected
attribute.semantics: Total number of object instances for which the joined federate has had a Reflect Attribute Values service invocation.

attribute.name: HLAobjectInstancesDeleted
attribute.semantics: Total number of times the Delete Object Instance service was invoked by the joined federate since the federate joined the federation

attribute.name: HLAobjectInstancesRemoved
attribute.semantics: Total number of times the Remove Object Instance service was invoked for the joined federate since the federate joined the federation.

attribute.name: HLAobjectInstancesRegistered
attribute.semantics: Total number of times the Register Object Instance or Register Object Instance with Region service was invoked by the joined federate since the federate joined the federation.

attribute.name: HLAobjectInstancesDiscovered
attribute.semantics: Total number of times the Discover Object Instance service was invoked for the joined federate since the federate joined the federation

attribute.name: HLAtimeGrantedTime
attribute.semantics: Wall clock time duration that the federate has spent in the Time Granted state since the last update of this attribute.

attribute.name: HLAtimeAdvancingTime
attribute.semantics: Wall clock time duration that the federate has spent in the Time Advancing state since the last update of this attribute.

attribute.name: HLAconveyRegionDesignatorSets
attribute.semantics: Value of federation-wide Convey Region Designator Sets Switch. Updated when value of switch changes

objectClass.name: HLAfederation
objectClass.semantics: This object class shall contain RTI state variables relating to a federation execution. The RTI shall publish it and shall register one object instance for the federation execution. It shall not automatically update the values of the instance attributes; a joined federate shall use a Request Attribute Value Update service to obtain values for the instance attributes.

attribute.name: HLAfederationName
attribute.semantics: Name of the federation to which the joined federate belongs

attribute.name: HLAfederatesInFederation
attribute.semantics: Identifiers of joined federates that are joined to the federation

attribute.name: HLARTIversion
attribute.semantics: Version of the RTI software

attribute.name: HLAFDDID
attribute.semantics: Identifier associated with the FDD used in the relevant Create Federation Execution service invocation.

attribute.name: HLAlastSaveName
attribute.semantics: Name associated with the last federation state save (null if no saves have occurred)

attribute.name: HLAlastSaveTime
attribute.semantics: Logical time at which the last federation state timed save occurred. The value shall not be defined if no timed saves have occurred.

attribute.name: HLAnextSaveName
attribute.semantics: Name associated with the next federation state save (null if no saves are scheduled)

attribute.name: HLAnextSaveTime
attribute.semantics: Logical time at which the next federation state timed save is scheduled. The value shall not be defined if no timed saves are scheduled.

attribute.name: HLAautoProvide
attribute.semantics: Value of federation-wide Auto Provide Switch. Updated when value of switch changes

interactionClass.name: Collision
interactionClass.semantics: The act or instance of coming together with solid impact.

parameter.name: CollidingObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the object that the issuing object has collided with.

parameter.name: IssuingObjectMass
parameter.semantics: The mass of the issuing object.

parameter.name: IssuingObjectVelocityVector
parameter.semantics: The velocity vector of the issuing object at the moment of impact.

parameter.name: CollisionType
parameter.semantics: The type of collision.

parameter.name: CollisionLocation
parameter.semantics: The location of the collision relative to the object that the issuing object has collided with.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: An ID assigned by the issuing object to associate related collision events.

parameter.name: IssuingObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the object that has detected the collision and issued the collision interaction.

interactionClass.name: CollisionElastic
interactionClass.semantics: The act or instance of coming together with solid impact in an elastic manner. An elastic collision allows a higher fidelity collision to be modeled, taking into account linear and rotational momentum transfer, variable elasticity, and momentum transfer that is dependent on surface orientation.

parameter.name: CoefficientOfRestitution
parameter.semantics: The degree that energy is conserved in a collision.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultXX
parameter.semantics: X-X Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultXY
parameter.semantics: X-Y Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultXZ
parameter.semantics: X-Z Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultYY
parameter.semantics: Y-Y Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultYZ
parameter.semantics: Y-Z Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultZZ
parameter.semantics: Z-Z Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: UnitSurfaceNormal
parameter.semantics: The normal vector to the surface at the point of collision detection.

interactionClass.name: EnvironmentObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: A base interaction for modifying instances of point, linear and areal environment object classes.

parameter.name: ObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies this EnvironmentObject instance (point, linear or areal).

parameter.name: ReferencedObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the Synthetic Environment object instance to which this EnvironmentObject instance is associated.

parameter.name: ForceIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the force that created or modified this EnvironmentObject instance.

parameter.name: ObjectType
parameter.semantics: Identifies the type of this EnvironmentObject instance.

parameter.name: RequestingIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the simulation application sending the EnvironmentObjectTransaction interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the simulation application receiving the EnvironmentObjectTransaction interaction.

interactionClass.name: ArealObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction for modifying instances of the ArealObject class.

parameter.name: PointsData
parameter.semantics: Specifies the physical location (a collection of points, in the world coordinate system) that defines the object.

parameter.name: PercentComplete
parameter.semantics: Specifies the percent completion of the object.

parameter.name: Damage
parameter.semantics: Specifies the damaged appearance of the object.

parameter.name: Predistributed
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object was created before the start of the exercise.

parameter.name: State
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object has been deactivated (it has ceased to exist in the synthetic environment).

parameter.name: IsSmoking
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object is smoking (creating a smoke plume).

parameter.name: IsFlaming
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether the object is burning and flames are visible.

parameter.name: IEDPresent
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether the object has or contains an IED.

interactionClass.name: OtherArealObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the OtherArealObject class.

interactionClass.name: MinefieldObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the MinefieldObject class.

parameter.name: BreachState
parameter.semantics: Specifies the breached appearance of the minefield object.

parameter.name: MineCount
parameter.semantics: Specifies the number of mines in the minefield.

interactionClass.name: LinearObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction for modifying instances of the LinearObject class.

interactionClass.name: BreachableLinearObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the BreachableLinearObject class.

parameter.name: SegmentRecords
parameter.semantics: Specifies a breachable linear object.

interactionClass.name: BreachObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the BreachObject class.

parameter.name: SegmentRecords
parameter.semantics: Specifies a breach linear object.

interactionClass.name: ExhaustSmokeObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the ExhaustSmokeObject class.

parameter.name: SegmentRecords
parameter.semantics: Specifies an exhaust smoke linear object.

interactionClass.name: OtherLinearObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the OtherLinearObject class.

interactionClass.name: SpeedBumpObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the SpeedBumpObject class.

parameter.name: SegmentRecords
parameter.semantics: Specifies a speed bump linear object.

interactionClass.name: WireObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the WireObject class.

parameter.name: SegmentRecords
parameter.semantics: Specifies a wire linear object.

interactionClass.name: MinefieldLaneMarkerObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the MinefieldLaneMarkerObject class.

parameter.name: SegmentRecords
parameter.semantics: Specifies a minefield lane marker linear object.

interactionClass.name: PointObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction for modifying instances of the PointObject class.

parameter.name: Location
parameter.semantics: Specifies the physical location of the object in the world coordinate system.

parameter.name: Orientation
parameter.semantics: Specifies the angles of rotation around the coordinate axis between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes ; these are calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles, specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the world coordinate system to the object coordinate system.

parameter.name: PercentComplete
parameter.semantics: Specifies the percent completion of the object.

parameter.name: Damage
parameter.semantics: Specifies the damaged appearance of the object.

parameter.name: Predistributed
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object was created before the start of the exercise.

parameter.name: State
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object has been deactivated (it has ceased to exist in the synthetic environment).

parameter.name: IsSmoking
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not the object is smoking (creating a smoke plume).

parameter.name: IsFlaming
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether the object is burning and flames are visible.

parameter.name: IEDPresent
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether the object has or contains an IED.

interactionClass.name: BreachablePointObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the BreachablePointObject class.

parameter.name: BreachState
parameter.semantics: Specifies the breached appearance of the object.

interactionClass.name: BridgeObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the BridgeObject class.

interactionClass.name: BuildingRubbleObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the BuildingRubbleObject class.

interactionClass.name: BurstPointObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the BurstPointObject class.

parameter.name: OpacityPercent
parameter.semantics: Specifies the opacity of the smoke.

parameter.name: Size
parameter.semantics: Specifies the radius of the cylinder approximating an individual smoke burst ; for multiple bursts, the center bottom of each cylinder is calculated based on the model used to represent the multiple bursts.

parameter.name: Height
parameter.semantics: Specifies the height of the cylinder approximating an individual smoke burst ; for multiple bursts, the center bottom of each cylinder is calculated based on the model used to represent the multiple bursts.

parameter.name: NumberOfBursts
parameter.semantics: Specifies the number of bursts in the instance of tactical smoke.

parameter.name: ChemicalType
parameter.semantics: Specifies the chemical content of the smoke.

interactionClass.name: CraterObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the CraterObject class.

parameter.name: Diameter
parameter.semantics: Specifies the diameter of the crater in meters, where the center of the crater is at the point object location.

parameter.name: Depth
parameter.semantics: Specifies the depth of the crater in centimeters.

parameter.name: Height
parameter.semantics: Specifies the height of the crater in centimeters.

parameter.name: BreachState
parameter.semantics: Specifies the breached appearance of the object.

interactionClass.name: DisturbedEarthObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the DisturbedEarthObject class.

parameter.name: Diameter
parameter.semantics: Specifies the diameter in decimeters.

parameter.name: Height
parameter.semantics: Specifies the height in centimeters.

parameter.name: Contrast
parameter.semantics: Specifies 16 levels of contrast (low to high) distinguishing variation of object from surrounding surface.

interactionClass.name: OtherPointObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the OtherPointObject class.

interactionClass.name: PotholeObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the PotholeObject class.

parameter.name: Diameter
parameter.semantics: Specifies the diameter in decimeters.

parameter.name: Depth
parameter.semantics: Specifies the depth in centimeters.

interactionClass.name: RibbonBridgeObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the RibbonBridgeObject class.

parameter.name: NumberOfSegments
parameter.semantics: Specifies the number of segments composing the ribbon bridge.

interactionClass.name: StructureObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the StructureObject class.

parameter.name: Color
parameter.semantics: Specifies the color of the building or structure.

parameter.name: PaintScheme
parameter.semantics: Specifies the visual paint design.

parameter.name: IsApertureOpen
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether the aperture (e.g., tent) is open or closed.

interactionClass.name: TreeObjectTransaction
interactionClass.semantics: An interaction sent to an environment manager to request the creation, modification, or deletion of instances of the TreeObject class.

parameter.name: Season
parameter.semantics: Specifies the visually represented season.

parameter.name: LeafCoverage
parameter.semantics: Specifies the leaf coverage.

interactionClass.name: MinefieldQuery
interactionClass.semantics: Provides the means by which a federate shall query a minefield simulation for information on the individual mines within the minefield operating in QRP mode.

parameter.name: MinefieldIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the minefield to which this query is addressed.

parameter.name: PerimeterPoints
parameter.semantics: Specifies the location of each perimeter point in the requested area relative to the minefield location.

parameter.name: QueryFusing
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not fusing is requested.

parameter.name: QueryMineOrientation
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not orientation is requested.

parameter.name: QueryGroundBurialDepthOffset
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not ground burial depth offset is requested.

parameter.name: QueryMineEmplacementAge
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not emplacement age is requested.

parameter.name: QueryPaintScheme
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not paint scheme is requested.

parameter.name: QueryReflectance
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not reflectance is requested.

parameter.name: QueryScalarDetectionCoefficient
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not scalar detection coefficient is requested.

parameter.name: QuerySnowBurialDepthOffset
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not snow burial depth offset is requested.

parameter.name: QueryThermalContrast
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not thermal contrast is requested.

parameter.name: QueryTripDetonationWire
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not trip detonation wire is requested.

parameter.name: QueryWaterBurialDepthOffset
parameter.semantics: Specifies whether or not water burial depth offset is requested.

parameter.name: RequestingIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the simulation application that requests the information from the minefield simulation.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the minefield query request.

parameter.name: RequestedMineType
parameter.semantics: Identifies the type of mine being queried by the requesting federate.

parameter.name: SensorTypes
parameter.semantics: Specifies the types of sensors requesting the data.

interactionClass.name: MinefieldData
interactionClass.semantics: Provides information on individual mines contained within a minefield.

parameter.name: GroundBurialDepthOffset
parameter.semantics: Specifies the offset of the origin of the mine coordinate system with respect to the ground surface.

parameter.name: Fusing
parameter.semantics: Specifies the primary and secondary fuse and anti-handling device for each mine.

parameter.name: MineEmplacementTime
parameter.semantics: Specifies the real-world (UTC) emplacement time of the mine.

parameter.name: MineEntityIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the mine entity identifier; the MineEntityID in conjunction with the MinefieldID form the unique identifier for each mine.

parameter.name: MinefieldIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the minefield to which the mines belong.

parameter.name: MineLocation
parameter.semantics: Specifies the location of the mine relative to the minefield location.

parameter.name: MineOrientation
parameter.semantics: Specifies the orientation of the center axis direction of fire of the mine, relative to the minefield Coordinate System.

parameter.name: MineType
parameter.semantics: Specifies the type of each mine contained within the minefield interaction.

parameter.name: NumberOfRecords
parameter.semantics: Specifies the total number of minefield records being published in response to a Minefield Query interaction.

parameter.name: NumberTripDetonationWires
parameter.semantics: Specifies the number of trip detonation wires that exist for each mine.

parameter.name: NumberWireVertices
parameter.semantics: Specifies the number of vertices for each trip wire.

parameter.name: PaintScheme
parameter.semantics: Specifies the camouflage scheme/color of the mine.

parameter.name: RecordSequenceNumber
parameter.semantics: Specifies the number of the current record in a sequence of minefield records published in response to a Minefield Query interaction.

parameter.name: Reflectance
parameter.semantics: Specifies the local dielectric difference between the mine and the surrounding soil.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the matching response to a request for mine information from the minefield simulation made by means of a Minefield Query interaction.

parameter.name: RequestingIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the simulation application that requested the information from the minefield simulation in QRP (Query Response Protocol) mode.

parameter.name: ScalarDetectionCoefficient
parameter.semantics: Specifies the coefficient to be utilized to insure proper correlation between detectors located on different simulation platforms.

parameter.name: SensorTypes
parameter.semantics: In QRP mode, specifies the requesting sensor types which were specified in the minefield query whereas in Heartbeat mode, specifies the sensor types that are being served by the minefield.

parameter.name: SnowBurialDepthOffset
parameter.semantics: Specifies the offset of the origin of the mine coordinate system with respect to the snow surface.

parameter.name: ThermalContrast
parameter.semantics: Specifies the temperature difference between the mine and the surrounding soil in degrees Centigrade.

parameter.name: WaterBurialDepthOffset
parameter.semantics: Specifies the offset of the origin of the mine coordinate system with respect to the water surface.

parameter.name: WireVertices
parameter.semantics: Specifies the locations of vertices in a trip wire.

interactionClass.name: MinefieldResponseNACK
interactionClass.semantics: A response to a MinefieldQuery providing information on individual mines within a minefield.

parameter.name: MinefieldIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the minefield to which this query is addressed.

parameter.name: MissingRecordNumbers
parameter.semantics: Specifies the record numbers that were not received in a sequence of minefield records.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the minefield query request.

parameter.name: RequestingIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the simulation application that requested the information from the minefield simulation.

interactionClass.name: RadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: The wireless transmission and reception of audio or digital data by means of electromagnetic waves.

interactionClass.name: EncodedAudioRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: A radio signal used to transmit voice/audio data encoded according to a standard encoding scheme.

parameter.name: AudioData
parameter.semantics: The data associated with the encoded audio radio signal.

interactionClass.name: RawBinaryRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: A radio signal used to transmit raw binary data.

parameter.name: HostRadioIndex
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the radio transmitting this signal.

parameter.name: DataRate
parameter.semantics: The rate at which the data is being transmitted.

parameter.name: SignalDataLength
parameter.semantics: The length of the signal data.

parameter.name: SignalData
parameter.semantics: The signal data.

parameter.name: TacticalDataLinkType
parameter.semantics: The type of tactical data link used to transmit this signal (if any).

parameter.name: TDLMessageCount
parameter.semantics: The number of tactical data link messages contained in this signal.

interactionClass.name: DatabaseIndexRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: A radio signal that represents transmission of a pre-determined message by using a pre-defined database index.

parameter.name: HostRadioIndex
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the radio transmitting this signal.

parameter.name: DatabaseIndex
parameter.semantics: The index into the federation specific database of stored signals.

parameter.name: Duration
parameter.semantics: The duration of the stored signal to be replayed.

parameter.name: StartOffset
parameter.semantics: The offset, from the start of the stored signal, that the signal is replayed from.

parameter.name: TacticalDataLinkType
parameter.semantics: The type of tactical data link used to transmit this signal (if any).

parameter.name: TDLMessageCount
parameter.semantics: The number of tactical data link messages contained in this signal.

interactionClass.name: ApplicationSpecificRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: A radio signal that can be used for an application specific encoding scheme.

parameter.name: HostRadioIndex
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the radio transmitting this signal.

parameter.name: DataRate
parameter.semantics: The rate at which the data is being transmitted.

parameter.name: SignalDataLength
parameter.semantics: The length of the signal data.

parameter.name: SignalData
parameter.semantics: The signal data.

parameter.name: TacticalDataLinkType
parameter.semantics: The type of tactical data link used to transmit this signal (if any).

parameter.name: TDLMessageCount
parameter.semantics: The number of tactical data link messages contained in this signal.

parameter.name: UserProtocolID
parameter.semantics: The ID of the user protocol in use.

interactionClass.name: IFFEmission
interactionClass.semantics: An IFF electromagnetic signal, used by IFF systems in Interactive Mode.

parameter.name: IFFSystemIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The identification of the IFFSystem object emitting this IFF electromagnetic signal or composite set of signals.

parameter.name: TransmissionIndicator
parameter.semantics: Indication whether this is an interrogation, a reply to an interrogation, or a squitter transmission.

parameter.name: InterrogatingObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object that is interrogating another object.

parameter.name: InterrogatedObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object to which the interrogation is being directed.

parameter.name: InteractiveEventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Used to associate a reply to an interrogation. The Event Identifier is set by an interrogator that issues an interactive IFF emission, and the identical number is included in the reply by an interactive transponder to an interrogation. The first number assigned is one, and then is incremented by one for each succeeding interactive interrogation for the same IFF system. A transponder that has a capability to issue an interactive IFF transmission representing of one or more squitter message(s) shall always set the Event Identifier to zero.

parameter.name: InterrogatedModes
parameter.semantics: The modes being interrogated.

parameter.name: ReportingSimulation
parameter.semantics: The simulation publishing this IFF emission.

parameter.name: DataCommunicationsSpecificInformation
parameter.semantics: Specific information for data communications (DIS IFF PDU layer 5) that varies by System Type.

parameter.name: BasicMode5
parameter.semantics: Basic data for an interactive Mode 5 interrogation or corresponding reply.

parameter.name: BasicModeS
parameter.semantics: Basic data for an interactive Mode S interrogation or corresponding reply.

interactionClass.name: Interrogation
interactionClass.semantics: An IFF interrogation.

interactionClass.name: Reply
interactionClass.semantics: Reply to an IFF interrogation.

parameter.name: ReplyAmplification
parameter.semantics: Amplifying information about the reply.

parameter.name: Mode4Reply
parameter.semantics: Specification of a Mode 4 reply to an Interactive Mode interrogation.

parameter.name: Mode5Reply
parameter.semantics: Specification of a Mode 5 reply to an Interactive Mode interrogation.

parameter.name: ModeSDAPSource
parameter.semantics: Indicates whether IFF Data records are present in the ModeSDAPData array attribute that can be used as the source for Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameters (DAPs).

parameter.name: ModeSDAPData
parameter.semantics: IFF Data records representing Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameters (DAPs).

interactionClass.name: Squitter
interactionClass.semantics: An IFF transponder emission transmitting information without receiving an interrogation.

parameter.name: ModeSDAPSource
parameter.semantics: Indicates whether IFF Data records are present in the ModeSDAPData array attribute that can be used as the source for Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameters (DAPs).

parameter.name: ModeSDAPData
parameter.semantics: IFF Data records representing Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameters (DAPs).

interactionClass.name: AcousticTransient
interactionClass.semantics: Specifies the occurrence of a transient acoustic event such as torpedo tube floodings, hatch slams, and wrench drops.

parameter.name: ActivityCode
parameter.semantics: Index into a data base of transient acoustic events.

parameter.name: ActivityParameter
parameter.semantics: The current state of the activity specified by the activity code.

parameter.name: HostObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Object Instance ID of the object emitting the sound.

parameter.name: RelativePosition
parameter.semantics: The location of the sound relative to the hosts coordinate system.

interactionClass.name: Fire
interactionClass.semantics: Base class for information associated with the firing or launch of a munition or expendable.

parameter.name: FiringObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the entity firing the munition or expendable.

parameter.name: TargetObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the intended target (if any).

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: An ID, generated by the issuing federate, used to associate related fire and detonation events.

parameter.name: FireMissionIndex
parameter.semantics: A unique index to identify the fire mission (used to associate weapon fire interactions in a single fire mission).

parameter.name: FiringLocation
parameter.semantics: The location, in world coordinates, from which the munition or expendable was launched.

parameter.name: InitialVelocityVector
parameter.semantics: The velocity vector of the munition or expendable when fired.

parameter.name: FireControlSolutionRange
parameter.semantics: The range used in the fire control solution. Zero if the range is unknown or inapplicable.

interactionClass.name: WeaponFire
interactionClass.semantics: Communicates information associated with the firing or launch of a munition.

parameter.name: MunitionObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the fired munition, if an object instance is registered.

parameter.name: MunitionType
parameter.semantics: The type of munition being fired.

parameter.name: WarheadType
parameter.semantics: The type of warhead fitted to the munition being fired.

parameter.name: FuseType
parameter.semantics: The type of fuse on the munition.

parameter.name: QuantityFired
parameter.semantics: The number of rounds fired in the burst.

parameter.name: RateOfFire
parameter.semantics: The rate of fire in rounds per minute when quantity > 1. Zero otherwise.

interactionClass.name: ExpendableFire
interactionClass.semantics: Communicates information associated with the firing or launch of an expendable.

parameter.name: ExpendableObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the fired expendable, if an object instance is registered.

parameter.name: ExpendableType
parameter.semantics: The type of expendable being fired.

interactionClass.name: Detonation
interactionClass.semantics: Base class for information associated with the impact or detonation of a munition, a non-munition explosion, or the burst or ignition of an expendable.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: An ID, generated by the issuing federate, used to associate related fire and detonation events.

parameter.name: FinalVelocityVector
parameter.semantics: The velocity vector of the munition immediately before detonation/impact, the velocity of a non-munition entity immediately before exploding, or the velocity of an expendable immediately before a chaff burst or ignition of a flare.

parameter.name: DetonationLocation
parameter.semantics: The location of the detonation in world coordinates.

parameter.name: RelativeDetonationLocation
parameter.semantics: The location of the munition detonation, the expendable detonation, or the non-munition explosion in respectively the target entity's coordinate system, the coordinate system of the entity that launched the expendable, or the exploded entity's coordinate system.

parameter.name: DetonationResultCode
parameter.semantics: The type of detonation (including no detonation).

parameter.name: VariableParametersArray
parameter.semantics: Array of information on articulated parts, attached parts, and other data associated with a detonation or explosion.

interactionClass.name: MunitionDetonation
interactionClass.semantics: Communicates information associated with the impact or detonation of a munition.

parameter.name: FiringObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the entity that fired the munition.

parameter.name: TargetObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the target entity if known.

parameter.name: MunitionObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Object instance ID of the fired munition, if an object instance is registered.

parameter.name: MunitionType
parameter.semantics: The type of munition that is detonating.

parameter.name: WarheadType
parameter.semantics: The type of warhead on the munition.

parameter.name: FuseType
parameter.semantics: The type of fuse on the munition.

parameter.name: QuantityFired
parameter.semantics: The number of rounds fired in the burst.

parameter.name: RateOfFire
parameter.semantics: The rate of fire in rounds per minute when quantity > 1. Zero otherwise.

interactionClass.name: ExpendableBurst
interactionClass.semantics: Communicates information associated with the burst or ignition of an expendable.

parameter.name: LaunchingObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the entity that launched the expendable.

parameter.name: ThreatObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the target threat entity, if applicable and known, that caused the release of the expendable.

parameter.name: ExpendableObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Object instance ID of the fired expendable, if an object instance is registered.

parameter.name: ExpendableType
parameter.semantics: The type of expendable.

interactionClass.name: Explosion
interactionClass.semantics: Communicates information associated with a non-munition explosion.

parameter.name: SourceObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the entity that caused the non-munition entity, or portion thereof, to explode.

parameter.name: ExplodedObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the entity, or portion thereof, that exploded.

parameter.name: ExplodingObjectType
parameter.semantics: The type of object that exploded.

parameter.name: ExplosiveMaterial
parameter.semantics: The material that exploded.

parameter.name: ExplosiveForce
parameter.semantics: The explosive force expressed as the equivalent kilograms of TNT.

interactionClass.name: RepairComplete
interactionClass.semantics: Notifies the requesting entity that the requested repair has been completed.

parameter.name: ReceivingObject
parameter.semantics: Object requesting repairs.

parameter.name: RepairingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that is able to perform the requested repair.

parameter.name: RepairType
parameter.semantics: Type of repair performed.

interactionClass.name: RepairResponse
interactionClass.semantics: Acknowledges the notification of the completion of a repair.

parameter.name: ReceivingObject
parameter.semantics: Object requesting repairs.

parameter.name: RepairingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that is able to perform the requested repair.

parameter.name: RepairResultCode
parameter.semantics: Result of repair.

interactionClass.name: ResupplyCancel
interactionClass.semantics: Communicates the canceling of a service function by either the receiving or the supplying entity.

parameter.name: ReceivingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that is receiving supplies.

parameter.name: SupplyingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that has offered supplies.

interactionClass.name: ResupplyOffer
interactionClass.semantics: Communicates the offer of supplies from a supplying entity to a receiving entity.

parameter.name: ReceivingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that the supplies are being offered to.

parameter.name: SupplyingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that is offering the supplies.

parameter.name: SuppliesData
parameter.semantics: List of supplies that are offered.

interactionClass.name: ResupplyReceived
interactionClass.semantics: Acknowledge the receipt of supplies.

parameter.name: ReceivingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that is receiving the supplies.

parameter.name: SupplyingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that is providing the supplies.

parameter.name: SuppliesData
parameter.semantics: List of supplies taken by receiving object.

interactionClass.name: ServiceRequest
interactionClass.semantics: A request for logistics support. The requesting entity issues the interaction to the supplying entity asking for repair or specific supplies.

parameter.name: RequestingObject
parameter.semantics: Object requesting service.

parameter.name: ServicingObject
parameter.semantics: Object that is able to provide the requested service.

parameter.name: ServiceType
parameter.semantics: Type of requested service.

parameter.name: SuppliesData
parameter.semantics: For a service of resupply, the list of supplies to be exchanged. If the service requested is not resupply, then this parameter shall be omitted.

interactionClass.name: Acknowledge
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a SIMAN interaction from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the federate has implemented the request.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: This field matches this response with the specific StartResume, StopFreeze, CreateEntity or RemoveEntity interaction sent by the simulation manager.

parameter.name: AcknowledgeFlag
parameter.semantics: The type of interaction being acknowledged.

parameter.name: ResponseFlag
parameter.semantics: The type of response made to the interaction by the recipient.

interactionClass.name: AcknowledgeR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a SIMAN interaction, with a specified acknowledgement protocol, from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the federate has implemented the request.

interactionClass.name: ActionRequest
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction sent from a Simulation Manager federate to one or more federates to request that they perform a specified action.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

parameter.name: ActionRequestCode
parameter.semantics: The action that the recipient(s) are requested to perform.

parameter.name: FixedDatums
parameter.semantics: Optional additional data items (types and values).

parameter.name: VariableDatumSet
parameter.semantics: Optional additional data items (types and values). These data items are not of fixed length.

interactionClass.name: ActionRequestR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction sent from a Simulation Manager federate to one or more federates to request that they perform a specified action. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: ActionResponse
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of an ActionResponse interaction from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the federate has implemented the request.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: This field matches this response with the specific ActionRequest interaction sent by the simulation manager.

parameter.name: RequestStatus
parameter.semantics: The status of the request that the recipient has been asked to perform.

parameter.name: FixedDatums
parameter.semantics: Additional, fixed-length data items (types and values).

parameter.name: VariableDatumSet
parameter.semantics: Additional, non-fixed-length, data items (types and values).

interactionClass.name: ActionResponseR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of an ActionResponseR interaction from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the federate has implemented the request.

interactionClass.name: Comment
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction used to insert messages and information into a log stream and closely matches the structures used by the Data interaction class. This information is usually unsolicited in nature. The information contained within the Interaction should be used for commenting purposes only.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

parameter.name: VariableDatumSet
parameter.semantics: The set of data items (types and values) associated with the interaction.

interactionClass.name: CommentR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction used to insert messages and information into a log stream and closely matches the structures used by the Data interaction class. This information is usually unsolicited in nature. The information contained within the Interaction should be used for commenting purposes only.

interactionClass.name: CreateEntity
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager to request that an application creates an entity.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The FederateIdentifier field identifies the federate that is responsible for creating the entity (if possible). The complete parameter defines the entity ID of the new entity (see also note [18]).

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

interactionClass.name: CreateEntityR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager to request that an application creates an entity, using a specified acknowledgement service.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: Data
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge either a) a DataQuery interaction (in which case the Data interaction contains the results of the query) or b) a SetData interaction (in which case the Data interaction contains the data that the federate was able to set).

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: This field matches this response with the specific SetData or DataQuery interaction sent by the simulation manager.

parameter.name: FixedDatums
parameter.semantics: The set of data items (types and values), of fixed length, that the recipient can return for this interaction.

parameter.name: VariableDatumSet
parameter.semantics: The set of data items (types and values), of variable length, that the recipient can return for this interaction.

interactionClass.name: DataR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge either a) a DataQueryR interaction (in which case the DataR interaction contains the results of the query) or b) a SetDataR interaction (in which case the DataR interaction contains the data that the federate was able to set).

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: DataQuery
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to request that a federate supply the current values of specified data.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

parameter.name: TimeInterval
parameter.semantics: The interval between regular updates of the requested data. If this field is zero then the recipient should only issue a single Data interaction in response to this interaction.

parameter.name: FixedDatumIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: The set of fixed length data items (types) that the recipient is requested to supply data for.

parameter.name: VariableDatumIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: The set of variable length data items (types) that the recipient is requested to supply data for.

interactionClass.name: DataQueryR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to request that a federate supply the current values of specified data. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: EventReport
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to allow a federate to alert a Simulation Manager federate that a particular event has occurred.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

parameter.name: EventType
parameter.semantics: The type of event being reported.

parameter.name: FixedDatums
parameter.semantics: The set of fixed size data items (types and values) associated with this event.

parameter.name: VariableDatumSet
parameter.semantics: The set of variable size data items (types and values) associated with this event.

interactionClass.name: EventReportR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to allow a federate to alert a Simulation Manager federate that a particular event has occurred.

interactionClass.name: RemoveEntity
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager to request that a specified entity be removed from the simulation.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

interactionClass.name: RemoveEntityR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager to request that a specified entity be removed from the simulation.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: SetData
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to request that a federate sets the values of specified data to specified values.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

parameter.name: FixedDatums
parameter.semantics: The set of fixed length data items (types and values) that the recipient is requested to set.

parameter.name: VariableDatumSet
parameter.semantics: The set of variables length data items (types and values) that the recipient is requested to set.

interactionClass.name: SetDataR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to request that a federate sets the values of specified data to specified values. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: StartResume
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to either a) start simulating one or more entities or b) resume simulation of one or more entities after a pause.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

parameter.name: RealWorldTime
parameter.semantics: The real world time (GMT) that the entity or entities should start/resume at.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

parameter.name: SimulationTime
parameter.semantics: The simulation time that the entity or entities should use when they start/resume.

interactionClass.name: StartResumeR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to either a) start simulating one or more entities or b) resume simulation of one or more entities after a pause. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: StopFreeze
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to request that one or more entities either a) freeze (pause) their simulation or b) stop their simulation.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

parameter.name: RealWorldTime
parameter.semantics: The real world time (GMT) that the entity or entities should stop/freeze at.

parameter.name: Reason
parameter.semantics: The reason for the stop or freeze.

parameter.name: ReflectValues
parameter.semantics: Whether the entity or entities being stopped/frozen should continue to reflect values when stopped/frozen.

parameter.name: RunInternalSimulationClock
parameter.semantics: Whether the entity or entities being stopped/frozen should continue to run their internal simulation clock when stopped/frozen.

parameter.name: UpdateAttributes
parameter.semantics: Whether the entity or entities being stopped/frozen should continue to update attributes when stopped/frozen.

interactionClass.name: StopFreezeR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to request that one or more entities either a) pause their simulation or b) stop their simulation. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: RecordR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a RecordQueryR or SetRecordR interaction from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the federate has implemented the request.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: This field matches this response with the specific RecordQueryR or SetRecordR interaction sent by the simulation manager.

parameter.name: EventType
parameter.semantics: The type of event that caused the RecordR interaction to be issued.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for the transaction.

parameter.name: ResponseSerialNumber
parameter.semantics: Used to identify the serial number of the RecordR interaction when more than one interaction is used to report record values.

parameter.name: RecordSetData
parameter.semantics: The set of records containing the information requested.

interactionClass.name: RecordQueryR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to allow a Simulation Manager federate to request data, in record format, from another federate.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

parameter.name: TimeInterval
parameter.semantics: The interval between regular updates of the requested data. If this field is zero then the recipient should only issue a single RecordR interaction in response to this interaction.

parameter.name: EventType
parameter.semantics: Specifies the type of event that the receiving entity or application should use to trigger the issue of a RecordR interaction in response to this query. If this is zero, then reporting shall be periodic based upon the value of the TimeInterval parameter.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for the transaction.

parameter.name: RecordIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: Identifies the records for which information is requested.

interactionClass.name: SetRecordR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to request that a federate sets the values of specified data to specified values (provided in record format).

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.3

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

parameter.name: RecordSetData
parameter.semantics: Specifies the information, in record format, to be set by the receiving entity.

interactionClass.name: TransferOwnership
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent to initiate the transfer of control of an entity.

parameter.name: OriginatingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application sending the interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingEntity
parameter.semantics: The entity ID of the entity or application which is the intended recipient(s) of the interaction.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

parameter.name: TransferType
parameter.semantics: The type of transfer to be performed.

parameter.name: TransferEntity
parameter.semantics: The ID of the object to be transferred.

parameter.name: RecordSetData
parameter.semantics: Specifies the information, in record format, to be set by the receiving entity.

interactionClass.name: AttributeChangeRequest
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to ask that a specified attribute be set to a specified value.

parameter.name: ObjectIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: The list of objects that are the intended recipients of this interaction.

parameter.name: AttributeValueSet
parameter.semantics: The set of attributes and their values, that the recipients are asked to update.

interactionClass.name: AttributeChangeRequestR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to ask that a specified attribute be set to a specified value. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: AttributeChangeResult
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of an AttributeChangeRequest interaction from a Simulation Manager federate, and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the attribute was set to the specified value or not.

parameter.name: ObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the object replying to the AttributeChangeRequest interaction.

parameter.name: AttributeChangeResult
parameter.semantics: Indicates ability to comply.

parameter.name: AttributeValueSet
parameter.semantics: The set of attributes and their values that the recipient has been able to update.

interactionClass.name: AttributeChangeResultR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of an AttributeChangeRequest interaction from a Simulation Manager federate, and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the attribute was set to the specified value or not. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for this transaction.

interactionClass.name: CreateObjectRequest
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to another federate requesting that it create an object instance of a particular type.

parameter.name: ObjectClass
parameter.semantics: The fully qualified (as defined in the HLA standard) class name of the object to be created.

parameter.name: AttributeValueSet
parameter.semantics: The set of attributes, and associated values, to be used to initialize the object.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

interactionClass.name: CreateObjectRequestR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager federate to another federate requesting that it create an object instance of a particular type. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: CreateObjectResult
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a CreateObjectRequest from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the object creation was successful or not.

parameter.name: CreateObjectResult
parameter.semantics: Indicates ability to comply.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: This field matches this response with the specific CreateObject interaction sent by the simulation manager.

interactionClass.name: CreateObjectResultR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a CreateObjectRequest from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the object creation was successful or not. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

interactionClass.name: RemoveObjectRequest
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager to request that one or more specified objects be removed from the simulation.

parameter.name: ObjectIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: The IDs of the objects to be removed.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The Request ID is a monotonically increasing integer identifier inserted by the Simulation Manager into all Simulation management interactions. It is used as a unique identifier to identify the latest in a series of competing requests and identifying acknowledgements.

interactionClass.name: RemoveObjectRequestR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction, sent from a Simulation Manager to request that one or more specified objects be removed from the simulation.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for a transaction.

interactionClass.name: RemoveObjectResult
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a RemoveObjectRequest interaction, and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the removal was successful or not.

parameter.name: RemoveObjectResult
parameter.semantics: Indicates ability to comply.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: This field matches this response with the specific RemoveObject interaction sent by the simulation manager.

interactionClass.name: RemoveObjectResultR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of a RemoveObjectRequestR interaction, and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the removal was successful or not.

interactionClass.name: ActionRequestToObject
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction sent from a Simulation Manager federate to one or more specific object instances to request that they perform a specified action.

parameter.name: ObjectIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: The list of objects that are the intended recipients of this interaction.

parameter.name: ActionRequestCode
parameter.semantics: The action that the recipient(s) are intended to perform.

interactionClass.name: ActionRequestToObjectR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction sent from a Simulation Manager federate to one or more specific object instances to request that they perform a specified action. The Simulation Manager federate specifies the acknowledgement protocol to be used.

parameter.name: AcknowledgementProtocol
parameter.semantics: The acknowledgement protocol to be used for this transaction.

interactionClass.name: ActionResponseFromObject
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of an ActionResponseToObject interaction from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the object has implemented the request.

parameter.name: ActionResult
parameter.semantics: The status of the request that the recipient has been asked to perform.

interactionClass.name: ActionResponseFromObjectR
interactionClass.semantics: A Simulation Management (SIMAN) interaction designed to acknowledge receipt of an ActionResponseToObjectR interaction from a Simulation Manager federate and to inform the Simulation Manager federate whether the object has implemented the request.

interactionClass.name: IOinteraction
interactionClass.semantics: Base class for interactions associated with information operations.

parameter.name: OriginatingFederate
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the simulation that is issuing the interaction.

parameter.name: SimulationSource
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the name of the simulation model issuing this interaction.

parameter.name: AttackerObject
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the IO attacker object.

parameter.name: PrimaryTargetObject
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the IO primary target object.

parameter.name: CommunicationsNodes
parameter.semantics: Information about the IO communications nodes.

parameter.name: Effects
parameter.semantics: Information about the IO effects.

interactionClass.name: IOaction
interactionClass.semantics: Actions initiated by an IO simulation to support interactions with other IO simulations shall be communicated using the IO Action interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingFederate
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the simulation to which this interaction is addressed, if applicable.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the request number for this IO Action.

parameter.name: WarfareType
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the type of IO warfare.

parameter.name: ActionType
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the type of IO action.

parameter.name: ActionPhase
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the phase of the IO action.

interactionClass.name: IOreport
interactionClass.semantics: The information operations status of an entity shall be conveyed using the IO Report interaction.

parameter.name: ReportType
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the type of IO report.

interactionClass.name: HLAmanager
interactionClass.semantics: Root class of MOM interactions

interactionClass.name: HLAfederate
interactionClass.semantics: Root class of MOM interactions that deal with a specific joined federate

parameter.name: HLAfederate
parameter.semantics: Handle of the joined federate that was provided when joining.

interactionClass.name: HLAadjust
interactionClass.semantics: Permit a joined federate to adjust the RTI statevariables associated with another joined federate

interactionClass.name: HLAsetTiming
interactionClass.semantics: Adjust the time period between updates of the HLAmanager.HLAfederate object instance for the specified joined federate. If this interaction is never sent, the RTI shall not perform periodic updates

parameter.name: HLAreportPeriod
parameter.semantics: Number of seconds between updates of instance attribute values of the HLAfederate object instance (A zero value causes periodic updates to cease)

interactionClass.name: HLAmodifyAttributeState
interactionClass.semantics: Modify the ownership state of an attribute of an object instance for the specified joined federate. If the interaction is used to give ownership of the instance attribute to the specified joined federate and another joined federate currently owns the instance attribute, the owning joined federate shall be divested of ownership of the instance attribute before ownership is granted to the specified joined federate. No notification of change of ownership of the instance attribute shall be provided to either joined federate. In order for ownership of the instance attribute to be granted to the specified joined federate, the following conditions shall be true: - the specified joined federate knows about the object instance - the specified joined federate is publishing the corresponding class attribute at the known class of the specified object instance at that joined federate - the specified instance attribute is not owned by the RTI (i.e., it's not a predefined attribute of a MOM object class) If one or more of the above conditions are not met, then the interaction shall have no effect and an error shall be reported via an interaction of class HLAmanager. HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportMOMexception.

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstance
parameter.semantics: Handle of the object instance whose attribute state is being changed

parameter.name: HLAattribute
parameter.semantics: Handle of the instance attribute whose stateis being changed

parameter.name: HLAattributeState
parameter.semantics: New state for the attribute of the object instance

interactionClass.name: HLAsetServiceReporting
interactionClass.semantics: Specify whether to report service invocations to0 or from the specified joined federate via HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLAreport.HLAreportServiceInvocation interactions (enable or disable servicereporting). If the specified joined federate is subscribed to the HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportServiceInvocation interaction, all attempts to enable service reporting for that joined federate by sending an HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAadjust. HLAsetServiceReporting interaction with an HLAreportingState parameter value of HLAtrue shall fail and be reported via the normal MOM interaction failure means

parameter.name: HLAreportingState
parameter.semantics: Whether the RTI should report service invocations (default = HLAfalse)
