interactionClass.name: HLAsetExceptionReporting
interactionClass.semantics: Specify whether the RTI shall report service invocation exceptions via HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportException interactions

parameter.name: HLAreportingState
parameter.semantics: Whether the RTI should report exceptions (default = HLAfalse)

interactionClass.name: HLAsetSwitches
interactionClass.semantics: Set the values of several HLA switches.

parameter.name: HLAconveyRegionDesignatorSets
parameter.semantics: Set the federation-wide Convey Region Designator Sets Switch to the provided value (this parameter is required only when a change of this switch value is needed).

interactionClass.name: HLArequest
interactionClass.semantics: Permit a federate to request RTI data about another federate

interactionClass.name: HLArequestPublications
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send report interactions that contain the publication data of a joined federate. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager. HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportInteractionPublication and one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLAreport.HLAreportObjectClassPublication for each object class published

interactionClass.name: HLArequestSubscriptions
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send report interactions that contain the subscription data of a joined federate. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager. HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportInteractionSubscription and one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLAreport.HLAreportObjectClassSubscription for each object class published

interactionClass.name: HLArequestObjectInstancesThatCanBeDeleted
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains the object instances that can be deleted at the joined federate. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportObjectInstancesThatCanBeDeleted

interactionClass.name: HLArequestObjectInstancesUpdated
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains the object instance updating responsibility of a joined federate. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportObjectInstancesUpdated

interactionClass.name: HLArequestObjectInstancesReflected
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains the objects instances for which a joined federate has had a Reflect Attribute Values service invocation. It shall result in one interaction ofclass HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportObjectInstancesReflected

interactionClass.name: HLArequestUpdatesSent
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains the number of updates that a joined federate has generated. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportUpdatesSent for each transportation type that is used to send updates

interactionClass.name: HLArequestInteractionsSent
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains the number of interactions that a joined federate has generated. This count shall include interactions sent with region. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportInteractionsSent for each transportation type that is used to send interactions

interactionClass.name: HLArequestReflectionsReceived
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains the number of reflections that a joined federate has received. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportReflectionsReceived for each transportation type used in receiving reflections

interactionClass.name: HLArequestInteractionsReceived
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains the number of interactions that a joined federate has received. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportInteractionsReceived for each transportation typeused in receiving interactions

interactionClass.name: HLArequestObjectInstanceInformation
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains the information that a joined federate maintains on a single object instance. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportObjectInstanceInformation

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstance
parameter.semantics: Handle of the object instance for which information is being requested

interactionClass.name: HLArequestSynchronizationPoints
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains a list of all in-progress federation synchronization points. It shall result in one interaction class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportSynchronizationPoints

interactionClass.name: HLArequestSynchronizationPointStatus
interactionClass.semantics: Request that the RTI send a report interaction that contains a list that includes each federate (and its synchronization point status) that is associated with a particular synchronization point. It shall result in one interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport. HLAreportSynchronizationPointStaus

interactionClass.name: HLAreport
interactionClass.semantics: Report RTI data about a joined federate. The RTI shall send these interactions in response to interactions of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLArequest.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportObjectClassPublication
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestPublications. It shall report the attributes of one object class published by the joined federate. One of these interactions shall be sent for each object class containing attributes that are published by the joined federate

parameter.name: HLAnumberOfClasses
parameter.semantics: The number of object classes for which the joined federate publishes attributes

parameter.name: HLAobjectClass
parameter.semantics: The object class whose publication is being reported

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of handles of HLAobjectClass attributes that the joined federate is publishing

interactionClass.name: HLAreportObjectClassSubscription
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestSubscriptions. It shall report the attributes of one object class subscribed to by the joined federate. One of these interactions shall be sent for each object class that is subscribed to by the joined federate. This information shall reflect related DDM usage.

parameter.name: HLAnumberOfClasses
parameter.semantics: The number of object classes for which the joined federate subscribes to attributes. This information shall reflect related DDM usage.

parameter.name: HLAobjectClass
parameter.semantics: The object class whose subscription is being reported

parameter.name: HLAactive
parameter.semantics: Whether the subscription is active

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of handles of class attributes to which the joined federate is subscribing.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportInteractionPublication
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestPublications. It shall report the interaction classes published by the joined federate

parameter.name: HLAinteractionClassList
parameter.semantics: List of interaction classes that the joined federate is publishing

interactionClass.name: HLAreportInteractionSubscription
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestSubscriptions. It shall report the interaction classes subscribed to by the joined federate. This information shall reflect related DDM usage.

parameter.name: HLAinteractionClassList
parameter.semantics: List of interaction class/subscription type pairs. Each pair consists of the handle of an interaction class that the joined federate is subscribed to and whether the joined federate is actively subscribing. This information shall reflect related DDM usage.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportObjectInstancesThatCanBeDeleted
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLArequest.HLArequestObject InstancesThatCanBeDeleted. It shall report the number of object instances (by registered class of the object instances) whose HLAprivilegeToDeleteObject attribute areowned by the joined federate.

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstanceCounts
parameter.semantics: A list of object instance counts. Each object instance count consists of an object class handle and the number of object instances of that class

interactionClass.name: HLAreportObjectInstancesUpdated
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestObjectInstancessUpdated. It shall report the number of object instances (by registered class of the object instances) for which the joined federate has invoked the Update Attribute Values service.

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstanceCounts
parameter.semantics: List of object instance counts. Each object instance count consists of an object class handle and the number of object instances of that class.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportObjectInstancesReflected
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestObjectInstancessReflected. It shall report the number of object instances (by registered class of the object instances) for which the joined federate has had a Reflect Attribute Values service invocation.

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstanceCounts
parameter.semantics: List of object instance counts. Each object instance count consists of an object class handle and the number of object instances of that class.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportUpdatesSent
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestUpdatesSent. It shall report the number of updates sent (by registered class of the object instances of the updates) by the joined federate since the beginning of the federation execution. One interaction of this class shall be sent by the RTI for each transportation type used.

parameter.name: HLAtransportation
parameter.semantics: Transportation type used in sending updates

parameter.name: HLAupdateCounts
parameter.semantics: List of update counts. Each update count consists of an object class handle and the number of updates sent of that class

interactionClass.name: HLAreportReflectionsReceived
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestReflectionsReceived. It shall report the number of reflections received (by registered class of the object instances of the reflects) by the joined federate since the beginning of the federation execution. One interaction of this class shall be sent by the RTI for each transportation type used.

parameter.name: HLAtransportation
parameter.semantics: Transportation type used in receiving reflections

parameter.name: HLAreflectCounts
parameter.semantics: List of reflection counts. Each reflection count consists of an object class handle and the number of reflections received of that class.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportInteractionsSent
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestInteractionsSent. It shall report the number of interactions sent (by sent class of the interactions) by the joined federate since the beginning of the federation execution. This count shall include interactions sent with region. One interaction of this class shall be sent by the RTI for each transportation type used.

parameter.name: HLAtransportation
parameter.semantics: Transportation type used in sending interactions

parameter.name: HLAinteractionCounts
parameter.semantics: List of interaction counts. Each interaction count consists of an interaction class handle and the number of interactions of that class. This information shall reflect related DDM usage.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportInteractionsReceived
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest. HLArequestInteractionsReceived. It shall report the number of interactions received (by sent class of the interactions) by the joined federate since the beginning of the federation execution. One interaction of this class shall be sent by the RTI for each transportation type used.

parameter.name: HLAtransportation
parameter.semantics: Transportation type used in receiving interactions

parameter.name: HLAinteractionCounts
parameter.semantics: List of interaction counts. Each interaction count consists of an interaction class handle and the number of interactions of that class.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportObjectInstanceInformation
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestObjectInstance Information. It shall report on a single object instance and portray the attributes of that object instance that are owned by the joined federate, the registered class of the object instance, and the known class of the object instance at the joined federate.

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstance
parameter.semantics: Handle of the object instance for which the interaction was sent

parameter.name: HLAownedInstanceAttributeList
parameter.semantics: List of the handles of all instance attributes, of the object instance, owned by the joined federate

parameter.name: HLAregisteredClass
parameter.semantics: Handle of the registered class of the object instance

parameter.name: HLAknownClass
parameter.semantics: Handle of the known class of the object instance at the joined federate

interactionClass.name: HLAreportException
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI when an exception occurs as the result of a service invocation at the indicated joined federate. This interaction shall be sent only if the last HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAadjust. HLAsetExceptionReporting interaction changing the HLAreportingState parameter sets the parameter to HLAtrue, for the indicated joined federate.

parameter.name: HLAservice
parameter.semantics: Name of the service that raised the exception

parameter.name: HLAexception
parameter.semantics: Textual depiction of the exception

interactionClass.name: HLAreportServiceInvocation
interactionClass.semantics: This interaction shall be sent by the RTI whenever an HLA service is invoked, either by the indicated joined federate or by the RTI at the indicated joined federate, and Service Reporting is Enabled for the indicated joined federate. This interaction shall always contain the arguments supplied by the service invoker. If the service invocation was successful, the interaction also shall contain the value returned to the invoker (if the service returns a value); otherwise, the interaction also shall contain an indication of the exception that shall be raised to the invoker.

parameter.name: HLAservice
parameter.semantics: Textual name of the service

parameter.name: HLAsuccessIndicator
parameter.semantics: Whether the service invocation was successful. Exception values are returned along with HLAfalse value

parameter.name: HLAsuppliedArguments
parameter.semantics: Textual depiction of the arguments supplied in the service invocation

parameter.name: HLAreturnedArguments
parameter.semantics: Textual depiction of the argument returned by the service invocation (null if the service does not normally return a value or if HLAsuccessIndicator is HLAfalse)

parameter.name: HLAexception
parameter.semantics: Textual depiction of the exception raised by this service invocation (null if HLAsuccessIndicator is HLAtrue)

parameter.name: HLAserialNumber
parameter.semantics: This is a per-joined federate serial number that shall start at zero and shall increment by 1 for each HLAmanager.HLAfederate.HLAreport HLAreportServiceInvocation interaction that represents service invocations to or from the respective joined federate.

interactionClass.name: HLAreportMOMexception
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI when one the following occurs: - a MOM interaction without all the necessary parameters is sent or - an interaction that imitates a federate's invocation of an RTI service is sent and not all of the service's pre-conditions are met.

parameter.name: HLAservice
parameter.semantics: Name of the service interaction that had a problem or raised the exception

parameter.name: HLAexception
parameter.semantics: Textual depiction of the problem or exception

parameter.name: HLAparameterError
parameter.semantics: HLAtrue if there was an incorrect number of interaction parameters, HLAfalse otherwise

interactionClass.name: HLAreportSynchronizationPoints
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestSynchronizationPoints. It shall report the list of active synchronization points in the federation execution.

parameter.name: HLAsyncPoints
parameter.semantics: List of the in progress federation execution synchronization points

interactionClass.name: HLAreportSynchronizationPointStatus
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction shall be sent by the RTI in response to an interaction of class HLAmanager.HLAfederate. HLArequest.HLArequestSynchronizationPointStatus. It shall report the status of a particular synchronization point. This shall be a list that includes each federate (and its synchronization status) that is associated with a particular synchronization point.

parameter.name: HLAsyncPointName
parameter.semantics: Name of a particular synchronization point

parameter.name: HLAsyncPointFederates
parameter.semantics: List of each federate (and its synchronization status) associated with the particular synchronization point

interactionClass.name: HLAservice
interactionClass.semantics: The interaction class shall be acted upon by the RTI. These interactions shall invoke HLA services on behalf of another joined federate. They shall cause the RTI to react as if the service has invoked by that other joined federate. If exceptions arise as a result of the use of these interactions, they shall be reported via the HLAmanager. HLAfederate.HLAreport.HLAreportMOMexception interaction to all joined federates that subscribe to this interaction. There are two ways an error can occur: the sending federate does not provide all the required arguments as parameters or the preconditions of the spoofed service are not met. Each type of error is reported via the HLAMOMreportMOMexception. NOTE?These interactions shall have the potential to disrupt normal federation execution and should be used with great care.

interactionClass.name: HLAresignFederationExecution
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the joined federate to resign from the federation execution. A joined federate shall be able to send this interaction anytime.

parameter.name: HLAresignAction
parameter.semantics: Action that the RTI is to take in conjunction with the resignation

interactionClass.name: HLAsynchronizationPointAchieved
interactionClass.semantics: Mimic the federate's report of achieving a synchronization point.

parameter.name: HLAlabel
parameter.semantics: Label associated with the synchronization point

interactionClass.name: HLAfederateSaveBegun
interactionClass.semantics: Mimic the federate's report of starting a save

interactionClass.name: HLAfederateSaveComplete
interactionClass.semantics: Mimic the joined federate's report of completion of a save. A joined federate shall be able to send this interaction during a federation save.

parameter.name: HLAsuccessIndicator
parameter.semantics: Whether the save was successful

interactionClass.name: HLAfederateRestoreComplete
interactionClass.semantics: Mimic the joined federate's report of completion of a restore. A joined federate shall be able to send this interaction during a federation restore.

parameter.name: HLAsuccessIndicator
parameter.semantics: Whether the restore was successful

interactionClass.name: HLApublishObjectClassAttributes
interactionClass.semantics: Set the joined federate's publication status of attributes belonging to an object class

parameter.name: HLAobjectClass
parameter.semantics: Object class for which the joined federate's publication shall change

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of handles of attributes of HLAobjectClass, which the federate shall now publish

interactionClass.name: HLAunpublishObjectClassAttributes
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the joined federate no longer to publish attributes of an object class

parameter.name: HLAobjectClass
parameter.semantics: Object class for which the joined federate's unpublication shall change

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of handles of attributes of HLAobjectClass, which the joined federate shall now unpublish

interactionClass.name: HLApublishInteractionClass
interactionClass.semantics: Set the joined federate's publication status of an interaction class

parameter.name: HLAinteractionClass
parameter.semantics: Interaction class that the joined federate shall publish

interactionClass.name: HLAunpublishInteractionClass
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the joined federate no longer to publish an interaction class

parameter.name: HLAinteractionClass
parameter.semantics: Interaction class that the joined federate shall no longer publish

interactionClass.name: HLAsubscribeObjectClassAttributes
interactionClass.semantics: Set the joined federate's subscription status of attributes belonging to an object class

parameter.name: HLAobjectClass
parameter.semantics: Object class for which the joined federate's subscription shall change

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of handles of attributes of HLAobjectClass to which the joined federate shall now subscribe

parameter.name: HLAactive
parameter.semantics: Whether the subscription is active

interactionClass.name: HLAunsubscribeObjectClassAttributes
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the joined federate no longer to subscribe to attributes of an object class

parameter.name: HLAobjectClass
parameter.semantics: Object class for which the joined federate's subscription shall change

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of handles of attributes of HLAobjectClass to which the joined federate shall now unsubscribe

interactionClass.name: HLAsubscribeInteractionClass
interactionClass.semantics: Set the joined federate's subscription status to an interaction class.

parameter.name: HLAinteractionClass
parameter.semantics: Interaction class to which the federate shall subscribe

parameter.name: HLAactive
parameter.semantics: Whether the subscription is active

interactionClass.name: HLAunsubscribeInteractionClass
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the joined federate no longer to subscribe to an interaction class

parameter.name: HLAinteractionClass
parameter.semantics: Interaction class to which the joined federate will no longer be subscribed

interactionClass.name: HLAdeleteObjectInstance
interactionClass.semantics: Cause an object instance to be deleted from the federation.

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstance
parameter.semantics: Handle of the object instance that is to be deleted

parameter.name: HLAtag
parameter.semantics: Tag associated with the deletion

parameter.name: HLAtimeStamp
parameter.semantics: Time stamp of the deletion (optional)

interactionClass.name: HLAlocalDeleteObjectInstance
interactionClass.semantics: Inform the RTI that it shall treat the specified object instance as if thejoined federate did not know about the object instance.

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstance
parameter.semantics: Handle of the object instance that is to be deleted

interactionClass.name: HLAchangeAttributeTransportationType
interactionClass.semantics: Change the transportation type used by the joined federate when sending attributes belonging to the object instance

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstance
parameter.semantics: Handle of the object instance whose attribute transportation type is to be changed

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of the handles of instance attributes whose transportation type is to be changed

parameter.name: HLAtransportation
parameter.semantics: Transportation type to be used for updating instance attributes in the list

interactionClass.name: HLAchangeInteractionTransportationType
interactionClass.semantics: Change the transportation type used by the joined federate when sending a class of interaction

parameter.name: HLAinteractionClass
parameter.semantics: Interaction class whose transportation type is changed by this service invocation

parameter.name: HLAtransportation
parameter.semantics: Transportation type to be used for sending the interaction class

interactionClass.name: HLAunconditionalAttributeOwnershipDivestiture
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the ownership of attributes of an object instance to be unconditionally divested by the joined federate

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstance
parameter.semantics: Handle of the object instance whose attributes' ownership is to be divested

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of handles of instance attributes belonging to HLAobjectInstance whose ownership is to be divested by the joined federate

interactionClass.name: HLAenableTimeRegulation
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the joined federate to begin regulating the logical time of other joined federates

parameter.name: HLAlookahead
parameter.semantics: Lookahead to be used by the joined federate while regulating other joined federates

interactionClass.name: HLAdisableTimeRegulation
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the joined federate to cease regulating the logical time of other joined federates

interactionClass.name: HLAenableTimeConstrained
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the logical time of the joined federate to begin being constrained by the logical times of other joined federates

interactionClass.name: HLAdisableTimeConstrained
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the logical time of the joined federate to cease being constrained by the logical times of other joined federates

interactionClass.name: HLAtimeAdvanceRequest
interactionClass.semantics: Request an advance of the joined federate's logical time on behalf of the joined federate, and release zero or more messages for delivery to the joined federate

parameter.name: HLAtimeStamp
parameter.semantics: Time stamp requested

interactionClass.name: HLAtimeAdvanceRequestAvailable
interactionClass.semantics: Request an advance of the joined federate's logical time, on behalf of the joined federate, and release zero or more messages for delivery to the joined federate

parameter.name: HLAtimeStamp
parameter.semantics: Time stamp requested

interactionClass.name: HLAnextMessageRequest
interactionClass.semantics: Request the logical time of the joined federate to be advanced to the time stamp of the next TSO message that shall be delivered to the joined federate, provided that the message shall have a time stamp no greater than the logical time specified in the request, and release zero or more messages for delivery to the joined federate.

parameter.name: HLAtimeStamp
parameter.semantics: Time stamp requested

interactionClass.name: HLAnextMessageRequestAvailable
interactionClass.semantics: Request the logical time of the joined federate to be advanced to the time stamp of the next TSO message that shall be delivered to the joined federate, provided that the message shall have a time stamp no greater than the logical time specified in the request, and release zero or more messages for delivery to the joined federate.

parameter.name: HLAtimeStamp
parameter.semantics: Time stamp requested

interactionClass.name: HLAflushQueueRequest
interactionClass.semantics: Request the logical time of the joined federate to be advanced as far as possible, provided that the time stamp is less than or equal to the logical time specified in the request. All TSO and RO messages shall be delivered to the joined federate.

parameter.name: HLAtimeStamp
parameter.semantics: Time stamp requested

interactionClass.name: HLAenableAsynchronousDelivery
interactionClass.semantics: Cause the RTI to deliver receive-order messages to the joined federate at any time, even if the joined federate is time-constrained.

interactionClass.name: HLAdisableAsynchronousDelivery
interactionClass.semantics: When the joined federate is time-constrained, cause the RTI to deliver receive-order messages to the joined federate only when its time manager state is Time Advancing.

interactionClass.name: HLAmodifyLookahead
interactionClass.semantics: Change the lookahead value used by the joined federate

parameter.name: HLAlookahead
parameter.semantics: New value for lookahead

interactionClass.name: HLAchangeAttributeOrderType
interactionClass.semantics: Change the ordering type used by the joined federate when sending attributes belonging to the object instance

parameter.name: HLAobjectInstance
parameter.semantics: Handle of the object instance whose attribute order type is to be changed

parameter.name: HLAattributeList
parameter.semantics: List of the handles of instance attributes whose order type is to be changed

parameter.name: HLAsendOrder
parameter.semantics: Order type to be used for sending the instance attribute list

interactionClass.name: HLAchangeInteractionOrderType
interactionClass.semantics: Change the order type used by the joined federate when sending a class of interaction

parameter.name: HLAinteractionClass
parameter.semantics: Interaction class whose order type is changed by this service invocation

parameter.name: HLAsendOrder
parameter.semantics: Order type to be used for sending the interaction class

interactionClass.name: HLAfederation
interactionClass.semantics: Root class of MOM interactions that deal with a specific federation execution.

interactionClass.name: HLAadjust
interactionClass.semantics: Permit a federate to adjust the RTI state variables associated with a federation execution.

interactionClass.name: HLAsetSwitches
interactionClass.semantics: Set the values of several HLA switches.

parameter.name: HLAautoProvide
parameter.semantics: Set the federation-wide Auto Provide Switch to the provided value (this parameter is required only when a change of this switch value is needed).

timeStamp.semantics: Number of microseconds since the Epoch. The default Epoch is 00:00 Jan 1, 1970 in the UTC+0 time zone, but other Epochs may be agreed by a federation. Leap days are included in the calculation, but leap seconds are not.

updateReflectTag.semantics: User-supplied tag provided with each update/reflect of object instance attribute values. Contains (at least) the time at which the provided data is valid.

sendReceiveTag.semantics: User-supplied tag provided with each send/receive of an interaction. Contains (at least) the time at which the provided data is valid.

synchronization.label: RPRobjectsRegistered
synchronization.semantics: Indicates that all object instances have been registered.

synchronization.label: RPRattributesUpdated
synchronization.semantics: Indicates that all required updates with initial values have been provided for all registered instances.

transportation.name: HLAreliable
transportation.description: Provide reliable delivery of data in the sense that TCP/IP delivers its data reliably

transportation.name: HLAbestEffort
transportation.description: Make an effort to deliver data in the sense that UDP provides best-effort delivery

basicData.name: HLAfloat32BE
basicData.encoding: 32-bit IEEE normalized single-precision format. See IEEE Std 754-1985

basicData.name: HLAfloat32LE
basicData.encoding: 32-bit IEEE normalized single-precision format. See IEEE Std 754-1985

basicData.name: HLAfloat64BE
basicData.encoding: 64-bit IEEE normalized double-precision format. See IEEE Std 754-1985

basicData.name: HLAfloat64LE
basicData.encoding: 64-bit IEEE normalized double-precision format. See IEEE Std 754-1985

basicData.name: HLAinteger16BE
basicData.encoding: 16-bit two's complement signed integer. The most significant bit contains the sign.

basicData.name: HLAinteger16LE
basicData.encoding: 16-bit two's complement signed integer. The most significant bit contains the sign.

basicData.name: HLAinteger32BE
basicData.encoding: 32-bit two's complement signed integer. The most significant bit contains the sign.

basicData.name: HLAinteger32LE
basicData.encoding: 32-bit two's complement signed integer. The most significant bit contains the sign.

basicData.name: HLAinteger64BE
basicData.encoding: 64-bit two's complement signed integer first. The most significant bit contains the sign.

basicData.name: HLAinteger64LE
basicData.encoding: 64-bit two's complement signed integer first. The most significant bit contains the sign.

basicData.name: HLAoctet
basicData.encoding: Assumed to be portable among hardware devices.

basicData.name: HLAoctetPairBE
basicData.encoding: Assumed to be portable among hardware devices.

basicData.name: HLAoctetPairLE
basicData.encoding: Assumed to be portable among hardware devices.

simpleData.name: AccelerationMeterPerSecondSquaredFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Linear acceleration vector composed of SI base units. Based on the Linear Acceleration Vector record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.96 item b.

simpleData.name: AngleDegreeFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Angle, based on unit degree (of arc), unit symbol °.

simpleData.name: AngleRadianFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Angle, based on SI derived unit radian, unit symbol rad.

simpleData.name: AngularAccelerationRadianPerSecondSquaredFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Angular acceleration composed of SI base units.

simpleData.name: AngularVelocityRadianPerSecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Angular velocity vector composed of SI base units. Based on the Angular Velocity Vector record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.7.

simpleData.name: BitRateBitPerSecondUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Rate of transmission, in bits per second.

simpleData.name: BitsUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Number of valid data bits.

simpleData.name: BitsUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Number of valid data bits.

simpleData.name: CentimeterUnsignedInteger8
simpleData.semantics: Datatype based on SI derived unit centimeter, unit symbol cm.

simpleData.name: ClockTimeHourInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Time past on the clock in full hours since a specified point in time.

simpleData.name: ContrastLevelUnsignedInteger8
simpleData.semantics: 16 levels of contrast, low to high (least significant 4 bits).

simpleData.name: DecimeterUnsignedInteger8
simpleData.semantics: Datatype based on SI derived unit decimeter, unit symbol dm.

simpleData.name: DepthMeterFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Depth, based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: Enumeration16
simpleData.semantics: Generic representation of a 16-bit enumeration. The enumerators for this enumeration are defined outside of the RPR FOM.

simpleData.name: Enumeration32
simpleData.semantics: Generic representation of a 32-bit enumeration. The enumerators for this enumeration are defined outside of the RPR FOM.

simpleData.name: Enumeration8
simpleData.semantics: Generic representation of an 8-bit enumeration. The enumerators for this enumeration are defined outside of the RPR FOM.

simpleData.name: ExplosiveForceKilogramTNTFloat32
simpleData.units: kilogram of TNT (4.184 x 10^6 Joules per kilogram)
simpleData.semantics: Explosive force expressed as the equivalent kilograms of TNT.

simpleData.name: FireRateRoundPerMinuteUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Rate of fire, in rounds per minute.

simpleData.name: Float32
simpleData.semantics: Single-precision floating point number.

simpleData.name: Float64
simpleData.semantics: Double-precision floating point number.

simpleData.name: FrequencyHertzFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Frequency, based on SI derived unit hertz, unit symbol Hz.

simpleData.name: FrequencyHertzUnsignedInteger64
simpleData.semantics: Frequency of a radio transmission, in hertz.

simpleData.name: HLAASCIIchar
simpleData.semantics: Standard ASCII character (see ANSI Std X3.4-1986)

simpleData.name: HLAbyte
simpleData.semantics: Uninterpreted 8-bit byte

simpleData.name: HLAfederateHandle
simpleData.semantics: The type of the argument to Normalize Federate Handle service. This is a pointer to an RTI-defined programming language object, not an integer 32

simpleData.name: HLAunicodeChar
simpleData.semantics: Unicode UTF-16 character (see The Unicode Standard, Version 3.0)

simpleData.name: Integer16
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [-2^15, 2^15-1].

simpleData.name: Integer32
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [-2^31, 2^31-1].

simpleData.name: InterrogationsPerSecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Number of interrogations per second.

simpleData.name: IrradianceWattPerMeterSquaredFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Radiant flux (power) received by a surface per unit area.

simpleData.name: LengthMeterFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Length, based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: MassKilogramFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Mass, based on SI base unit kilogram, unit symbol kg.

simpleData.name: MeterFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Datatype based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: MeterFloat64
simpleData.semantics: Datatype based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: MeterUnsignedInteger8
simpleData.semantics: Datatype based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: MineDielectricDifference
simpleData.semantics: Local dielectric difference between the mine and the surrounding soil (reflectance).

simpleData.name: MineIdentifier
simpleData.semantics: Specifies a mine entity identifier.

simpleData.name: NetNumberUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Net number, ranging from 0 to 999 decimal.

simpleData.name: Octet
simpleData.semantics: Uninterpreted 8-bit value.

simpleData.name: PowerRatioDecibelMilliwattFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Power ratio in decibels (dB) of a measured power referenced to 1 milliwatt (mW).

simpleData.name: PowerSettingFloat32
simpleData.semantics: A normalized value indicating the operator's power controller setting (e.g., the throttle position). In normal operation, the value shall be set in the range of POWER_IDLE (fixed value: 0.0) to POWER_MILITARY (maximum without afterburner; fixed value: 50.0) inclusive, proportional to the controller position. If an afterburner is engaged, the setting shall be in the range of POWER_MIN_AFTERBURNER (fixed value: 51.0) to POWER_MAX_AFTERBURNER (fixed value: 100.0) inclusive. If the propulsion system is off, the setting shall be set to POWER_ENGINE_OFF (fixed value: -100.0).

simpleData.name: PowerWattFloat32
simpleData.semantics: The unit of power is the watt (W), which is equal to one joule per second.

simpleData.name: PseudoCode12BitUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Pseudo crypto code in the range 0 to 4094 decimal.

simpleData.name: RevolutionsPerMinuteFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Rotation speed expressed in revolutions per minute.

simpleData.name: RevolutionsPerMinuteInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Frequency of rotation, expressed in revolutions per minute.

simpleData.name: RRBCodeUnsignedInteger8
simpleData.semantics: Decimal RRB code in (the least significant) 5 bits. See RRB documentation for the range of decimal values.

simpleData.name: SampleRateHertzUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Rate of sampling, in samples per second.

simpleData.name: SpeedChangeRateRPMPerSecondInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Angular acceleration.

simpleData.name: TemperatureDegreeCelsiusFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Temperature, based on SI derived unit degree Celsius, unit symbol °C.

simpleData.name: TimeHundredsOfMicrosecondInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, expressed in hundreds of microseconds.

simpleData.name: TimeHundredthMicrosecond
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, expressed in one-hundredths of a microsecond.

simpleData.name: TimeMicrosecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, expressed in microsecond, unit symbol μs.

simpleData.name: TimeMillisecondUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, expressed in millisecond, unit symbol ms.

simpleData.name: TimeSecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Time in SI base unit second, unit symbol s.

simpleData.name: TimeSecondInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, unit symbol s.

simpleData.name: TimeSecondUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, unit symbol s.

simpleData.name: TimestampUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: The time past the hour, scaled so that value 0 represents the start of the hour and value 2^31 - 1 represents one time unit before the start of the next hour, thereby resulting in each time unit representing exactly 3600/(2^31) s, which is approximately 1.67638063 microsecond.

simpleData.name: TransponderAngle180Degree18Bit
simpleData.semantics: Two's complement coded angle in 18 bits (0-17) with the Most Significant Bit (MSB, 17) equal to -180 degrees.

simpleData.name: TransponderAngle90Degree18Bit
simpleData.semantics: Two's complement coded angle in 18 bits (0-17) with the Most Significant Bit (MSB, 17) equal to -90 degrees.

simpleData.name: TransponderAngleError180DegreeInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Delta angle represented as two's complement coded latitude with the Most Significant Bit (MSB) equal to -90 degrees.

simpleData.name: TransponderAngleError90DegreeInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Delta angle represented as two's complement coded latitude with the Most Significant Bit (MSB) equal to -90 degrees.

simpleData.name: TransponderCode4DigitUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Four-digit octal code in the range 0000 to 7777 (base 8). The first (left-most) digit is Code Element 4 (A) and occupies bits 9 to 11, followed by Code Element 3 (B) in bits 6 to 8, Code Element 2 (C) in bits 3 to 5, and the last (right-most) digit is Code Element 1 (D) and occupies bits 0 to 2.

simpleData.name: TransponderDeltaAltitude100Foot
simpleData.semantics: Binary coded altitude in 11 bits (0-10) in 100-foot increments (range 0-100*(2^11)).

simpleData.name: TransponderDeltaAltitude25Foot
simpleData.semantics: Binary coded altitude in 11 bits (0-10) in 25-foot increments (range 0-25*(2^11)).

simpleData.name: TransponderModeCAltitude100Foot
simpleData.semantics: Binary coded Mode C altitude in 11 bits (0-10) in the range 0-126,000 feet in 100-foot increments.

simpleData.name: TransponderRelativeAltitude100Foot
simpleData.semantics: Binary coded altitude in 11 bits (0-10) in 100-foot increments referenced to -1000 feet.

simpleData.name: TransponderRelativeAltitude25Foot
simpleData.semantics: Binary coded altitude in 11 bits (0-10) in 25-foot increments referenced to -1000 feet.

simpleData.name: Undefined2Bit
simpleData.semantics: Undefined or undisclosed semantics of a 2-bit field.

simpleData.name: Undefined6Bit
simpleData.semantics: Undefined or undisclosed semantics of a 6-bit field.

simpleData.name: UnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [0, 2^16-1].

simpleData.name: UnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [0, 2^32-1].

simpleData.name: UnsignedInteger64
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [0, 2^64-1].

simpleData.name: UnsignedInteger8
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [0, 2^8-1].

simpleData.name: VelocityDecimeterPerSecondInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Velocity/Speed measured in decimeter per second.

simpleData.name: VelocityMeterPerSecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Speed/Velocity in meter per second.

simpleData.name: WavelengthMicronFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Wavelength expressed in micrometer.

simpleData.name: WordOfDayUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: A Word of Day (WOD) contains six decimal digits. The first digit can only be a 2 or a 3, while the second third and fourth can be 0 through 9. The last two digits can only be 00, 25, 50, or 75. WOD notation has a decimal between the third and fourth digit. Example notation: "300.025".

enumeratedData.name: DeadReckoningAlgorithmEnum8
enumeratedData.semantics: Dead Reckoning Algorithm [UID 44] Enumerated names for the Dead Reckoning Model (DRM) are formed by a combination of letter codes. Following is a description of the letter codes: F - Fixed orientation; angular velocity not used R - Rotating; orientation extrapolated using angular velocity P - Position extrapolated using linear velocity; acceleration not used V - Velocity and position extrapolated using velocity and acceleration W - Linear velocity and acceleration provided in world coordinates B - Linear velocity and acceleration provided in body coordinates; angular velocity required for all extrapolation

arrayData.name: OpaqueDatum64

arrayData.name: RPRbooleanArray8

fixedRecordData.name: AccelerationVectorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The magnitude of the change in linear velocity over time.

field.name: XAcceleration
field.semantics: Acceleration component along the X axis.

field.name: YAcceleration
field.semantics: Acceleration component along the Y axis.

field.name: ZAcceleration
field.semantics: Acceleration component along the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: AggregateMarkingStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Unique marking associated with an aggregate.

field.name: MarkingEncodingType
field.semantics: The type of marking.

field.name: MarkingData
field.semantics: The marking itself.

fixedRecordData.name: AngleDeceptionAngleDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Data defining the angle deception jamming in one plane.

field.name: Offset
field.semantics: Indicates the relative angle at which the deceptive radar returns are centered. This angle is measured with respect to the x-y plane of the victim radar's entity coordinate system. This angle is measured in radians from the victim radar entity's azimuth/elevation for the true jammer position to the center of the range of azimuths/elevations in which deceptive radar returns are perceived. For azimuth offset, positive and negative values indicate that the perceived positions of the jammer are right and left of the true position of the jammer, respectively. The range of permissible values is -pi to pi. For elevation offset, positive and negative values indicate that the perceived positions of the jammer are above and below the true position of the jammer, respectively. The range of permissible values is -pi/2 to pi/2.

field.name: Width
field.semantics: Indicates the range through which the deceptive radar returns are perceived, centered on the Offset. For azimuth width, the range of permissible values is 0 to 2pi radians. For elevation width, the range of permissible values is 0 to pi radians.

field.name: PullRate
field.semantics: Indicates the rate (in radians per second) at which the Offset value is changing. For azimuth pull rate, positive and negative values indicate that the azimuth offset is moving to the right or left, respectively. For elevation pull rate, positive and negative values indicate that the elevation offset is moving up or down, respectively.

field.name: PullAcceleration
field.semantics: Indicates the rate (in radians per second squared) at which the PullRate value is changing. Azimuth Pull Acceleration is defined as positive to the right and negative to the left. Elevation Pull Acceleration is defined as positive to upward and negative downward.

fixedRecordData.name: AngleDeceptionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of discrete values associated with angle deception jamming that cannot be referenced to an emitter mode. The values provided in the record shall be considered valid only for the victim radar beams listed in the jamming beam's JammedObjectIdentifiers. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.21.2 for more information, including Figure 46 and Figure 47 illustrating the concept of angle deception jamming.

field.name: AzimuthAngleData
field.semantics: The azimuth relative angle, width, pull rate, and pull acceleration.

field.name: ElevationAngleData
field.semantics: The elevation relative angle, width, pull rate, and pull acceleration.

fixedRecordData.name: AngularVelocityVectorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The rate at which the orientation is changing over time, in body coordinates.

field.name: XAngularVelocity
field.semantics: Acceleration component about the X axis.

field.name: YAngularVelocity
field.semantics: Acceleration component about the Y axis.

field.name: ZAngularVelocity
field.semantics: Acceleration component about the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: AntennaLocationIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of the location of an auxiliary IFF antenna for a transponder or interrogator.

field.name: SystemName
field.semantics: The name of the system with which this auxiliary IFF antenna is associated.

field.name: AntennaReferenceNumber
field.semantics: The reference number associated with each auxiliary antenna.

field.name: AntennaStatus
field.semantics: The status of the auxiliary antenna.

field.name: RelativeAntennaLocation
field.semantics: The location of the auxiliary antenna relative to the associated emitting entity's coordinate system.

fixedRecordData.name: AreaAimpointStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of directed energy weapon targeting information when the target is an area.

field.name: BeamAntennaPatterns
field.semantics: One or more non-self-identifying beam antenna patterns.

field.name: TargetEnergyDepositions
field.semantics: Zero or more non-self-identifying target energy deposition data sets.

fixedRecordData.name: ArticulatedPartParameterTypeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies the parameter type of an attached part, including the type class and type metric.

field.name: ParameterTypeClass
field.semantics: The type class uniquely identifies a particular articulated part on a given entity type. Guidance for uniquely assigning type classes to an entity's articulated parts is given in Section 4.8 of the enumeration document (SISO-REF-010).

field.name: ParameterTypeMetric
field.semantics: The type metric uniquely identifies the transformation to be applied to the articulated part.

fixedRecordData.name: ArticulatedPartVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify a movable part or a combination of a moveable/attached part of an entity. Based on the Articulated Part VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.2.

field.name: ChangeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicator of a change to the part. This field shall be set to zero for each exercise and sequentially incremented by one for each change in articulation parameters. In the case where all possible values are exhausted, the numbers shall be reused beginning at zero.

field.name: PartAttachedTo
field.semantics: Identification of the articulated part to which this articulation parameter is attached. This field shall contain the value zero if the articulated part is attached directly to the entity.

field.name: ParameterTypeClass
field.semantics: The type class uniquely identifies a particular articulated part on a given entity type. Guidance for uniquely assigning type classes to an entity's articulated parts is given in Section 4.8 of the enumeration document (SISO-REF-010).

field.name: ParameterTypeMetric
field.semantics: The type metric uniquely identifies the transformation to be applied to the articulated part.

field.name: Value
field.semantics: Value of the transformation to be applied to the articulated part.

fixedRecordData.name: AssociationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Represents an entity's association with another entity or location.

field.name: AssociationType
field.semantics: Indicates the type of association.

field.name: AssociatedObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: Identifies the associated object, if any.

field.name: AssociatedLocation
field.semantics: Specifies the associated location in world coordinates, if any.

fixedRecordData.name: AttachedPartVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify a removable part that may be attached to an entity. Based on the Attached Part VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.3.

field.name: DetachedIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether an attached part is attached or detached.

field.name: PartAttachedTo
field.semantics: Identification of the articulated or attached part to which this attached part is attached. This field shall contain the value zero if the attached part is attached directly to the entity.

field.name: ParameterType
field.semantics: Identification of the location (or station) to which the part is attached.

field.name: AttachedPartType
field.semantics: The entity type of the attached part.

fixedRecordData.name: AttributeValuePairStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Pair of an attribute name identifying an attribute and data for that attribute.

field.name: AttributeName
field.semantics: The attribute name.

field.name: AttributeValue
field.semantics: Value for the specified attribute.

fixedRecordData.name: AudioDataTypeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies an encoded audio radio signal.

field.name: StreamTag
field.semantics: Identifier for the audio stream. This must be globally unique.

field.name: EncodingType
field.semantics: The type of encoding used for the audio data.

field.name: SampleRate
field.semantics: The number of samples per second in the audio data.

field.name: DataLength
field.semantics: The length of the signal data.

field.name: SampleCount
field.semantics: The number of samples in this transmission.

field.name: Data
field.semantics: The signal data.

fixedRecordData.name: BasicHAVEQUICKModulationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Modulation parameters for Basic HAVE QUICK radio system.

field.name: NETID
field.semantics: The NET ID being used.

field.name: MWODIndex
field.semantics: This is an index into the "MWOD Index - WOD Correlation Table" provided by the exercise agreement. When exercise agreement data is not available or MWOD Index is not known, the default maintenance and training MWOD Index value of 1 shall be used, which corresponds to the WOD values in Table C.2 of IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section C.4.2.2.

field.name: TimeOfDay
field.semantics: The Time of Day (TOD) field for the Basic HAVE QUICK MP record is used to specify a representative Time of Day value for a given radio. A value of zero shall be considered a match to any other value received.

fixedRecordData.name: BeamAntennaStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies the direction, pattern, and polarization of radiation from a radio transmitter's antenna.

field.name: BeamOrientation
field.semantics: The rotation that transforms the reference coordinate system into the beam coordinate system.

field.name: BeamAzimuthBeamwidth
field.semantics: The full width of the beam to the -3 dB power density points in the x-y plane of the beam coordinate system.

field.name: BeamElevationBeamwidth
field.semantics: The full width of the beam to the -3 dB power density points in the x-z plane of the beam coordinate system.

field.name: ReferenceSystem
field.semantics: The reference coordinate system with respect to which beam direction is specified.

field.name: Ez
field.semantics: The magnitude of the Z-component (in beam coordinates) of the Electrical field at some arbitrary single point in the main beam and in the far field of the antenna.

field.name: Ex
field.semantics: The magnitude of the X-component (in beam coordinates) of the Electrical field at some arbitrary single point in the main beam and in the far field of the antenna.

field.name: BeamPhaseAngle
field.semantics: The phase angle between Ez and Ex in radians.

fixedRecordData.name: BeamSpotShapeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Parameters describing the ellipse shape approximating the irradiance region arriving at the target. The ellipse parameters are measured in the plane perpendicular to the direction of the beam. Refer to IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section A.2.4.3 for a detailed description.

field.name: CrossSectionSemiMajorAxis
field.semantics: The length of the semi-major axis of an ellipse.

field.name: CrossSectionSemiMinorAxis
field.semantics: The length of the semi-minor axis of an ellipse.

field.name: CrossSectionOrientationAngle
field.semantics: The orientation angle from the local 'down' vector to the semi-major axis of an ellipse.

fixedRecordData.name: BlankingSectorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of a persistent area within a scan volume where emitter power is reduced to an insignificant value. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.21.1 for more information, including Figure 45 illustrating an example.

field.name: LeftAzimuth
field.semantics: Indicates the left-most azimuth (clockwise in radians) for which emitted power is reduced. This angle is measured in the x-y plane of the radar's entity coordinate system. The range of permissible values is 0 to 2pi, with zero pointing in the x-direction.

field.name: RightAzimuth
field.semantics: Indicates the right-most azimuth (clockwise in radians) for which emitted power is reduced. This angle is measured in the x-y plane of the radar's entity coordinate system. The range of permissible values is 0 to 2pi, with zero pointing in the x-direction.

field.name: LowerElevation
field.semantics: Indicates the lowest elevation (in radians) for which emitted power is reduced. This angle is measured positive upward with respect to the x-y plane of the radar's entity coordinate system. The range of permissible values is -pi/2 to pi/2.

field.name: UpperElevation
field.semantics: Indicates the highest elevation (in radians) for which emitted power is reduced. This angle is measured positive upward with respect to the x-y plane of the radar's entity coordinate system. The range of permissible values is -pi/2 to pi/2.

field.name: ResidualPower
field.semantics: Specifies the residual effective radiated power in the blanking sector in dBm.

fixedRecordData.name: BreachableSegmentStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the characteristics of a breachable linear object segment.

field.name: SegmentParameters
field.semantics: Specifies the breachable linear object segment characteristics.

field.name: BreachLength
field.semantics: Specifies the fixed length in meters of a breached segment.

field.name: BreachState
field.semantics: Specifies the breached appearance of the breachable linear object segment.

field.name: SegmentBreached
field.semantics: Specifies whether the segment portion beginning at the segment origin + (i*BreachLength) and extending BreachLength meters is breached or not.

fixedRecordData.name: BreachStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the characteristics of a breach linear object segment.

field.name: SegmentParameters
field.semantics: Specifies the breach linear object segment characteristics.

fixedRecordData.name: CCTTSINCGARSModulationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Modulation parameters for CCTT SINCGARS radio system.

field.name: FHNetID
field.semantics: Frequency hopping network identifier.

field.name: HopSetID
field.semantics: Identification for the set of frequencies used when creating a hopping pattern.

field.name: LockoutSetID
field.semantics: Identification for the set of frequencies that are excluded from the hopping pattern.

field.name: StartOfMessage
field.semantics: Specifies whether the radio is starting or continuing a transmission. A CCTT SINCGARS radio shall not receive any part of an FH transmission if the Start of Message is missed. Start of message may be missed if the radio was transmitting, receiving a different radio, or otherwise not ready to start receiving a transmission.

field.name: ClearChannel
field.semantics: Specifies that the transmission is not subject to propagation loss, interference, COMSEC, or any other form of signal degradation. Clear channels are used for interoperability with older systems and for control purposes.

field.name: FHSynchronizationTimeOffset
field.semantics: The offset to exercise time in seconds for the clock in the radio.

field.name: TransmissionSecurityKey
field.semantics: Identifies the transmission security key that is used when generating the hopping pattern.

fixedRecordData.name: ClockTimeStruct

field.name: Hours

field.name: TimePastTheHour
field.semantics: The time past the hour indicated in the Hours field.

field.name: DetonationVelocity

field.name: ElementID
field.semantics: This field shall identify a particular communications element (e.g., radio, network component, or modem) within a given entity. If this element is a radio for which a RadioTransmitter object is being published, this value shall correspond to the RadioIndex of that object.

fixedRecordData.name: DeltaBarometricAltitudeStruct

field.name: DeltaAltitude
field.semantics: The delta barometric altitude.

field.name: PositiveNegativeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether the delta altitude value is Positive (0) or Negative (1). The Positive indicator means the offset is above the entity's present truth altitude and a Negative indicator means the offset is below the entity's present truth altitude.

fixedRecordData.name: DeltaMode5SAltitudeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The delta error in Mode 5 / Mode S Altitude of the entity with a Mode 5 or S transponder.

field.name: DeltaAltitude
field.semantics: The delta Mode 5 / Mode S altitude.

field.name: PositiveNegativeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether the delta altitude value is Positive (0) or Negative (1). The Positive indicator means the offset is above the entity's present truth altitude and a Negative indicator means the offset is below the entity's present truth altitude.

fixedRecordData.name: DimensionRateStruct

field.name: YRate

field.name: DamageDiameter

field.name: Temperature

field.name: ComponentIdentification

field.name: ComponentDamageStatus

field.name: ComponentVisualDamageStatus

field.name: ComponentVisualSmokeColor
