fixedRecordData.name: EngineFuelReloadStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying an entity's engine fuel reload information.

field.name: StandardQuantity
field.semantics: The standard quantity of this fuel type normally loaded at this fuel location.

field.name: MaximumQuantity
field.semantics: The maximum quantity of this fuel type that this fuel location is capable of holding.

field.name: StandardQuantityReloadTime
field.semantics: The number of seconds of simulation time normally required to reload the standard quantity of this fuel type at this specific fuel location.

field.name: MaximumQuantityReloadTime
field.semantics: The number of seconds of simulation time normally required to reload the maximum possible quantity of this fuel type at this fuel location.

field.name: FuelMeasurementUnits
field.semantics: Identifies the fuel measurement units.

field.name: FuelType
field.semantics: Identifies the type of fuel.

field.name: FuelLocation
field.semantics: Indicates the location of the fuel as related to the entity.

fixedRecordData.name: EngineFuelStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying an entity's engine fuel information.

field.name: FuelQuantity
field.semantics: The quantity of fuel remaining, in increments specified by the FuelMeasurementUnits field.

field.name: FuelMeasurementUnits
field.semantics: Identifies the fuel measurement units.

field.name: FuelType
field.semantics: Identifies the type of fuel.

field.name: FuelLocation
field.semantics: Indicates the location of the fuel as related to the entity.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityAssociationVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify an association or disassociation of two entities, or an entity with another object. Based on the Entity Association VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.4.

field.name: ChangeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether the (dis)association changed since the last issuance.

field.name: AssociationStatus
field.semantics: The association status between two entities, or an entity with another object.

field.name: AssociationType
field.semantics: The type of association that exists between two entities, or an entity with another object.

field.name: ObjectID
field.semantics: The object ID of the entity or other object associated with this entity.

field.name: OwnStationLocation
field.semantics: The station location on one's own entity where a physical connection is attached, if known.

field.name: PhysicalConnectionType
field.semantics: The type of physical connection, if any, between this entity and another entity or object.

field.name: GroupMemberType
field.semantics: The type of member the entity is within the group.

field.name: GroupNumber
field.semantics: The group, if any, to which an entity belongs.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityCoordinateVectorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Vector in the entity coordinate system. Based on the Entity Coordinate Vector record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.96 item a.

field.name: XComponent
field.semantics: Component along the X axis.

field.name: YComponent
field.semantics: Component along the Y axis.

field.name: ZComponent
field.semantics: Component along the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityIdentifierStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Unique, exercise-wide identification of the entity, or a symbolic group address referencing multiple entities or a simulation application. Based on the Entity Identifier record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.28. Also refer to IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 4.2.5.2 for general requirements for all object identifiers.

field.name: FederateIdentifier
field.semantics: Simulation application (federate) identifier.

field.name: EntityNumber
field.semantics: The reference number of the entity identifier.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityTypeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Type of entity. Based on the Entity Type and Aggregate Type record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Sections 6.2.30 and 6.2.5, respectively.

field.name: EntityKind
field.semantics: Kind of entity.

field.name: Domain
field.semantics: Domain in which the entity operates.

field.name: CountryCode
field.semantics: Country to which the design of the entity is attributed.

field.name: Category
field.semantics: Main category that describes the entity.

field.name: Subcategory
field.semantics: Subcategory to which an entity belongs based on the Category field.

field.name: Specific
field.semantics: Specific information about an entity based on the Subcategory field.

field.name: Extra
field.semantics: Extra information required to describe a particular entity.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityTypeVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify the Entity Type for an entity when it is different than the entity type value contained in the EntityType attribute. Based on the Entity Type VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.5.

field.name: ChangeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether the Entity Type changed since the last issuance.

field.name: EntityType
field.semantics: Entity Type associated with an entity.

fixedRecordData.name: EnvironmentObjectTypeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the domain, the kind and the specific identification of the environment object.

field.name: Domain
field.semantics: Specifies the domain in which the object exists.

field.name: Kind
field.semantics: Identifies the kind of object.

field.name: Category
field.semantics: Specifies the main category that describes the object.

field.name: Subcategory
field.semantics: Specifies a particular subcategory to which an object belongs based on the Category field.

fixedRecordData.name: EnvironmentRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying an environment (geometry or state) record.

field.name: Index
field.semantics: Identifies the sequentially numbered record index.

field.name: DataVariant
field.semantics: Specifies geometry and state record alternatives.

fixedRecordData.name: EventIdentifierStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Identification of an event. Based on the Event Identifier record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.33.

field.name: EventCount
field.semantics: The event number. Uniquely assigned by the simulation application (federate) that initiates the sequence of events. It shall be set to one for each exercise and incremented by one for each event. In the case where all possible values are exhausted, the numbers may be reused beginning again at one.

field.name: IssuingObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: Identification of the object issuing the event.

fixedRecordData.name: ExhaustSmokeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the characteristics of a linear object smoke segment.

field.name: SegmentParameters
field.semantics: Specifies the linear object smoke segment characteristics.

field.name: OpacityPercent
field.semantics: Specifies the opacity of the linear object smoke segment.

field.name: SmokeIsAttached
field.semantics: Specifies whether the linear object smoke segment is attached to the vehicle.

field.name: ChemicalType
field.semantics: Specifies the chemical content of the linear object smoke segment.

fixedRecordData.name: ExpendableReloadStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the reload information for an entity expendable.

field.name: ExpendableType
field.semantics: Identifies the entity type of the expendable.

field.name: StationOrLauncher
field.semantics: Indicates the station or launcher to which the expendable is assigned.

field.name: StandardQuantity
field.semantics: The standard quantity of this expendable type normally loaded at this station/launcher.

field.name: MaximumQuantity
field.semantics: The maximum quantity of this expendable type that this station/launcher is capable of holding.

field.name: StandardQuantityReloadTime
field.semantics: The number of seconds of simulation time normally required to reload the standard quantity of this expendable type at this station/launcher.

field.name: MaximumQuantityReloadTime
field.semantics: The number of seconds of simulation time normally required to reload the maximum possible quantity of this expendable type at this station/launcher.

fixedRecordData.name: ExpendableStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the information regarding an entity's expendable.

field.name: ExpendableType
field.semantics: Identifies the entity type of the expendable.

field.name: StationOrLauncher
field.semantics: Indicates the station or launcher to which the expendable is assigned.

field.name: Quantity
field.semantics: The quantity remaining of this expendable.

field.name: ExpendableStatus
field.semantics: Specifies the status of the expendable.

fixedRecordData.name: FalseTargetsStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of discrete values that are associated with false targets jamming that cannot be referenced to an emitter mode. The values provided in the record shall be considered valid only for the victim radar beams listed in the jamming beam's JammedObjectIdentifiers. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.21.3 for more information, including Figure 48 illustrating the effect.

field.name: FalseTargetCount
field.semantics: Specifies the number of false targets presented to the victim radar.

field.name: WalkSpeed
field.semantics: Specifies the speed (in meters per second) at which false targets move toward the victim radar. Negative values shall indicate a velocity away from the victim radar.

field.name: WalkAcceleration
field.semantics: Specifies the rate (in meters per second squared) at which false targets accelerate toward the victim radar. Negative values shall indicate an acceleration direction away from the victim radar.

field.name: MaximumWalkDistance
field.semantics: Specifies the distance (in meters) that a false target is to walk before it pauses in range.

field.name: KeepTime
field.semantics: Specifies the simulation time (in seconds) that a false target is to be held at the MaximumWalkDistance before it resets to its initial position.

field.name: EchoSpacing
field.semantics: Specifies the distance between false targets in meters. A positive value for this field shall indicate that the second and subsequent false targets appear at the given spacing relative to the first false target away from the victim radar (i.e., at increasing ranges from the victim). A negative value shall indicate that the second and subsequent false targets appear toward the victim radar relative to the first false target.

field.name: FirstTargetOffset
field.semantics: Sets the position of the first false target relative to the jamming entity in meters. A positive value for this field shall indicate that the first target appears at the given distance relative to the jamming entity away from the victim radar (i.e., at an increasing range from the victim). A negative value shall indicate the first false target appears toward the victim radar relative to the jamming entity. A value of zero shall place the first false target at the same position as the jamming entity.

fixedRecordData.name: FederateIdentifierStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Unique identification of the simulation application (federate) in an exercise, or a symbolic group address referencing multiple simulation applications. Based on the Simulation Address record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.80.

field.name: SiteID
field.semantics: Each site participating in an event (e.g., training exercise, experiment, and test) shall be assigned a unique SiteID that is different from any other site that is part of the same event. The range of valid SiteID values that may be assigned to a specific site is from 1 to 65 534. The manner in which SiteID values are assigned is part of federation agreements. A SiteID value of NO_SITE (fixed value: 0) indicates no specific site. A SiteID value of ALL_SITES (fixed value: FFFF (H)) indicates all sites.

field.name: ApplicationID
field.semantics: Each application (federate) participating in an event (e.g., training exercise) shall be assigned a unique ApplicationID value for the site with which the application is associated. An application may be assigned multiple ApplicationID values, see IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 4.2.3.3. The range of valid ApplicationID values that may be assigned to a specific application is from 1 to 65 534. The manner in which ApplicationID values are assigned is part of federation agreements. An ApplicationID value of NO_APPLIC (fixed value: 0) indicates no specific application. An ApplicationID value of ALL_APPLIC (fixed value: FFFF (H)) indicates all applications.

fixedRecordData.name: FixedDatumStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Identifier and value for a fixed datum.

field.name: FixedDatumIdentifier
field.semantics: The identifier for this fixed datum.

field.name: FixedDatumValue
field.semantics: The value of the fixed datum. The field may be used to convey one 8-, 16-, or 32-bit data value as specified by the FixedDatumIdentifier. Padding bits follow an 8- or 16-bit value to fill the 32-bit field.

fixedRecordData.name: FlareStateRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Flare state record.

field.name: TimeSinceCreation
field.semantics: Time since creation.

field.name: NumberIntensity
field.semantics: Number intensity.

field.name: NumberOfSources
field.semantics: Number of sources.

field.name: GeometryIndex
field.semantics: Geometry index.

fixedRecordData.name: FundamentalParameterDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Fundamental Parameter Data record.

field.name: EIRP
field.semantics: The average peak radiated power of the emission.

field.name: Frequency
field.semantics: The center frequency of the emission.

field.name: PgRF
field.semantics: When applied to originators, this field shall specify the number of interrogations per second emitted. This field shall be set to zero when applied to a responder (i.e. transponder) systems.

field.name: PulseWidth
field.semantics: The duration of the fundamental pulse of which the interrogation or reply is composed.

field.name: BurstLength
field.semantics: The number of emissions generated in a single burst. This field shall contain zero for continuously emitting systems and shall contain the value 1 for responders.

field.name: ApplicableModes
field.semantics: Specifies the modes to which the fundamental parameter data applies.

field.name: SystemSpecificData
field.semantics: System specific data associated with the system type.

fixedRecordData.name: GaussPlumeGeomRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Gaussian Plume geometry record.

field.name: SourceLocation
field.semantics: Source location X, Y, Z.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: Orientation, specified by Euler angles.

field.name: PlumeDimension
field.semantics: Plume dimensions.

field.name: PlumeDimensionRate
field.semantics: Variation of plume dimensions.

field.name: LeadingEdge
field.semantics: Leading edge.

field.name: LeadingEdgeVelocity
field.semantics: Leading edge velocity.

fixedRecordData.name: GaussPuffGeomRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Gaussian Puff geometry record.

field.name: PuffLocation
field.semantics: Puff location X, Y, Z.

field.name: OriginationLocation
field.semantics: Origination location X, Y, Z.

field.name: SigmaValue
field.semantics: Sigma dimensions.

field.name: SigmaRate
field.semantics: Variation of sigma dimensions.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: Orientation, specified by Euler angles.

field.name: Velocity
field.semantics: Velocity Vx, Vy, Vz.

field.name: AngularVelocity
field.semantics: Angular velocity Vx, Vy, Vz.

field.name: CentroidHeight
field.semantics: Centroid height.

fixedRecordData.name: GridAxisStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying grid Xi axis data.

field.name: InitialValue
field.semantics: Specifies the coordinate of the origin (or initial value) for the Xi axis.

field.name: FinalValue
field.semantics: Specifies the coordinate of the endpoint (or final value) for the Xi axis.

field.name: TotalNumberOfPoints
field.semantics: Specifies the total number of grid points along the Xi domain axis.

field.name: InterleafFactor
field.semantics: Specifies the integer valued interleaf factor along a domain (grid) Xi axis ; a value of one shall indicate no sub-sampling (interleaving), while integer values greater than one shall indicate the sampling frequency along an axis.

field.name: AxisData
field.semantics: Specifies axis data alternatives.

fixedRecordData.name: GridDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying grid data representation.

field.name: SampleType
field.semantics: Specifies the environmental data sample.

field.name: DataRepresentation
field.semantics: Specifies grid data representation alternatives.

fixedRecordData.name: GridValueType0Struct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying type 0 data representation.

field.name: DataValues
field.semantics: Specifies the environmental state variable data values. The data shall be represented as a stream of octets, the interpretation of which shall be agreed to prior to the start of the exercise.

fixedRecordData.name: GridValueType1Struct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying type 1 data representation.

field.name: Scale
field.semantics: Specifies the constant scale factor used to scale the environmental state variable data values.

field.name: Offset
field.semantics: Specifies the constant offset used to scale the environmental state variable data values.

field.name: DataValues
field.semantics: Specifies the environmental state variable data values.

fixedRecordData.name: GridValueType2Struct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying type 2 data representation.

field.name: DataValues
field.semantics: Specifies the environmental state variable data values.

fixedRecordData.name: GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Information contained in a Transponder/Interrogator (T/I) data link message in Ground-Initiated Comm-B (GICB) format.

field.name: TILinkType
field.semantics: The T/I link type.

field.name: MessageDesignator
field.semantics: The GICB message designator as defined in appropriate ICAO technical publications, represented by a 16-bit enumeration.

field.name: RegisterMessageNumber
field.semantics: The applicable register and message number for this message.

field.name: ProcessStatus
field.semantics: GICB Process Status.

field.name: RegisterDataValidity
field.semantics: GICB Register Data Validity.

field.name: Register
field.semantics: GICB register data.

field.name: Message
field.semantics: 56-bit GICB message data.

fixedRecordData.name: HighFidelityHAVEQUICKStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of a High Fidelity HAVE QUICK record. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section C.4.2.3 for more information.

field.name: NETID
field.semantics: Contains the NET ID being used.

field.name: TODTransmitIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether a TOD is being transmitted. This is also referred to as a Mickey.

field.name: TODDelta
field.semantics: Specifies the difference between the transceiver internal clock and the reference clock, which is the amount of clock drift that has occurred. This field is expressed in units of hundreds of microseconds. The reference clock is an internally simulated clock that simulates a drift or difference from the reference value of zero, with which all simulated HAVE QUICK radios are assumed to be synchronized. This drift shall be placed in the TOD Delta field of the transmitting radio. Receiving radios may then use the TOD Delta field to emulate audio effects (such as clipped or garbled audio) due to HAVE QUICK time mismatches. If the TOD Delta field is zero, the radio is considered to be synchronized with the reference clock for all of the High-Fidelity HAVE QUICK radios participating in the exercise.

field.name: WOD1
field.semantics: Word of Day (WOD) 1. All six WODs collectively are called a Multiple Word of Day (MWOD). May also be specified as segment 1 or CH20.

field.name: WOD2
field.semantics: Word of Day (WOD) 2. All six WODs collectively are called a Multiple Word of Day (MWOD). May also be specified as segment 2 or CH19.

field.name: WOD3
field.semantics: Word of Day (WOD) 3. All six WODs collectively are called a Multiple Word of Day (MWOD). May also be specified as segment 3 or CH18.

field.name: WOD4
field.semantics: Word of Day (WOD) 4. All six WODs collectively are called a Multiple Word of Day (MWOD). May also be specified as segment 4 or CH17.

field.name: WOD5
field.semantics: Word of Day (WOD) 5. All six WODs collectively are called a Multiple Word of Day (MWOD). May also be specified as segment 5 or CH16.

field.name: WOD6
field.semantics: Word of Day (WOD) 6. All six WODs collectively are called a Multiple Word of Day (MWOD). May also be specified as segment 6 or CH15.

fixedRecordData.name: HLAinteractionCount
fixedRecordData.semantics: Count of interactions of a class

field.name: HLAinteractionClass
field.semantics: Encoded interaction class handle

field.name: HLAinteractionCount
field.semantics: Number of interactions

fixedRecordData.name: HLAinteractionSubscription
fixedRecordData.semantics: Interaction subscription information

field.name: HLAinteractionClass
field.semantics: Encoded interaction class handle

field.name: HLAactive
field.semantics: Whether subscription is active (HLAtrue=active)

fixedRecordData.name: HLAobjectClassBasedCount
fixedRecordData.semantics: Object class and count of associated items

field.name: HLAobjectClass
field.semantics: Encoded object class handle

field.name: HLAcount
field.semantics: Number of items

fixedRecordData.name: HLAsynchPointFederate
fixedRecordData.semantics: A particular joined federate and its synchronization point status

field.name: HLAfederate
field.semantics: Encoded joined federate handle

field.name: HLAfederateSynchStatus
field.semantics: Synchronization status of the particular joined\ federate

fixedRecordData.name: InteractiveBasicMode5IFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Basic data for an interactive Mode 5 interrogation or corresponding reply.

field.name: MessageFormats
field.semantics: For a Mode 5 interrogator, this field contains the specific Message Formats being requested. These message formats may be different from those contained in the regeneration IFF object for this interrogator. For a Mode 5 transponder, this field contains the specific Message Formats that it actually responded to for this interrogation. This may be different from the Message Formats contained in the interrogation request, as well as the present Message Formats contained in the regeneration IFF object for this transponder.

fixedRecordData.name: InteractiveBasicModeSIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Basic data for an interactive Mode S interrogation or corresponding reply.

field.name: Levels
field.semantics: For a Mode S interrogator, this field indicates the Mode S levels it is interrogating. For a Mode S transponder, this field indicates the actual levels contained in this reply. The value of this field may or may not be the same as the present value for the ModeSLevelsPresent attribute of the IFF object.

field.name: TransmitState
field.semantics: The Mode S Transmit State that would be contained in this specific Mode S interactive interrogation. The value of this field may or may not be the same as the present value for the ModeSTransmitState attribute of the IFF object. Not applicable to a transponder and set to zero.

field.name: InterrogatorIdentifier
field.semantics: The Mode S Interrogator Identifier that would be contained in this specific Mode S interactive interrogation. The values of this record may or may not be the same as the present value for the ModeSInterrogatorIdentifier attribute of the IFF object. Not applicable to a transponder and set to zero.

fixedRecordData.name: InteractiveMode4ReplyIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of an interactive Mode 4 reply to an Interactive Mode 4 interrogation.

field.name: Reply
field.semantics: The Mode 4 reply that would be sent by this transponder to this Interactive Mode 4 interrogation. This may not be the same as the regeneration value.

fixedRecordData.name: InteractiveMode5ReplyIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The specification of an Interactive Mode 5 reply to an Interactive Mode 5 interrogation.

field.name: Reply
field.semantics: The Mode 5 reply that would be sent by this IFF system to this Interactive Mode 5 interrogation.

fixedRecordData.name: InterrogatedModesStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The specific modes and other basic data types related to an interactive interrogation, reply, or squitter transmission.

field.name: Mode1Included
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode 1 is being interrogated or contained in a transponder reply.

field.name: Mode2Included
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode 2 is being interrogated or contained in a transponder reply.

field.name: Mode3AIncluded
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode 3/A is being interrogated or contained in a transponder reply.

field.name: Mode4Included
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode 4 is being interrogated or contained in a transponder reply.

field.name: Mode5Included
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode 5 is being interrogated or contained in a transponder reply.

field.name: ModeSIncluded
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode S is being interrogated or contained in a transponder reply.

field.name: ModeCIncluded
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode C Altitude is being interrogated or contained in a transponder reply.

field.name: TCASIncluded
field.semantics: Set to True when TCAS/ACAS is being interrogated or contained in a transponder reply.

field.name: SpecialIPIncluded
field.semantics: Set to True when this is a Special Identification of Position (IP) transmission.

field.name: SquitterIncluded
field.semantics: Set to True when this is an interactive squitter transmission.

fixedRecordData.name: InterrogatorSideLobeSuppressionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Interrogator Side Lobe Suppression (ISLS) inhibits transponder replies to all challenges not radiated in the main beam of the interrogating antenna.

field.name: AntennaType
field.semantics: The type of antenna used by the system.

field.name: PulseRiseTime
field.semantics: The real-world time required for the leading edge of pulses P1, P2, and P3 to rise from 10 to 90 percent of its maximum voltage amplitude. Pulse Rise Time shall be expressed in one-hundredths of a microsecond where 1 is 0.01 microsecond and 99 is 0.99 microsecond.

field.name: PulseFallTime
field.semantics: The real-world time required for the leading edge of pulses P1, P2, and P3 to fall from 10 to 90 percent of its maximum voltage amplitude. Pulse Fall Time shall be expressed in one-hundredths of a microsecond where 1 is 0.01 microsecond and 99 is 0.99 microsecond.

fixedRecordData.name: IOCommunicationsNodeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of an IO Communications Node record. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.48.2 for more information.

field.name: CommunicationsNodeType
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the present type of communications node (sender, receiver, etc.).

field.name: CommunicationsNodeID
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the communications node identifier for the entity that is part of a simulated communications network.

fixedRecordData.name: IOEffectStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of an IO Effect record. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.48.3 for more information.

field.name: Status
field.semantics: This field shall indicate whether the IO effect has an effect on the sender, receiver, message(s), or some combination of them.

field.name: LinkType
field.semantics: This field shall identify the IO link type as a logical or physical link or node.

field.name: Effect
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the IO effect associated with this IO attack.

field.name: EffectDutyCycle
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the IO effect duty cycle represented as a percentage in the range of 0% to 100% in 1% increments.

field.name: EffectDuration
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the duration of the IO effect in seconds, from 1 s to 65 534 s. It shall be set to indicate IO_UNTIL_FURTHER_NOTICE (fixed value: 65 535) if the duration has no fixed simulation time interval. It shall be set to zero only if the Effect field is set to Terminate Effect (255).

field.name: Process
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the IO process being performed.

fixedRecordData.name: IrregularGridAxisStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying irregular (variable spacing) axis data.

field.name: NumberOfPoints
field.semantics: Specifies the number of grid locations along the Xi axis.

field.name: InitialIndex
field.semantics: Specifies the index of the initial grid point along the Xi domain axis.

field.name: CoordinateScale
field.semantics: Specifies the value that linearly scales the coordinates of the grid locations for the Xi axis.

field.name: CoordinateOffset
field.semantics: Specifies the constant offset value that shall be applied to the grid locations for the Xi axis.

field.name: GridLocations
field.semantics: Specifies the coordinate values for the Ni grid locations along the irregular (variable spacing) Xi axis.

fixedRecordData.name: IsPartOfStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Defines the spatial relationship between two objects.

field.name: HostEntityIdentifier
field.semantics: The identifier of the entity of which the object is a constituent part.

field.name: HostRTIObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: The RTI instance identifier of the object of which this object is a constituent part.

field.name: Relationship
field.semantics: The relationship of the constituent part object to its host object.

field.name: NamedLocation
field.semantics: The discrete positional relationship of the constituent part object with respect to its host object.

fixedRecordData.name: JammingTechniqueStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the kind, category, subcategory, and specific indication of a jamming technique.

field.name: Kind
field.semantics: Indicates the broadest category of jamming.

field.name: Category
field.semantics: Permits more detailed definition of techniques defined by the Kind.

field.name: Subcategory
field.semantics: Permits more detailed definition of techniques defined by the Kind and Category.

field.name: Specific
field.semantics: Provides a means for high-fidelity electronic warfare emitters to indicate the most detailed definition of techniques.

fixedRecordData.name: LaunchedMunitionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying a launched munition entity's firing and targeting information.

field.name: FireEventIdentifier
field.semantics: Contains the same identifier specified in the EventIdentifier parameter of the Fire interaction that communicated the launch of the munition.

field.name: FiringObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: Contains the same identifier as specified in the FiringObjectIdentifier parameter of the Fire interaction that communicated the launch of the munition.

field.name: TargetObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: Identifies the munition's target entity, if any.

field.name: TargetLocation
field.semantics: Specifies the munition's geographic target in world coordinates.

fixedRecordData.name: Line1GeomRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Line 1 geometry record.

field.name: StartPointLocation
field.semantics: Start point location.

field.name: EndPointLocation
field.semantics: End point location.

fixedRecordData.name: Line2GeomRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Line 2 geometry record.

field.name: StartPointLocation
field.semantics: Start point location.

field.name: EndPointLocation
field.semantics: End point location.

field.name: StartPointVelocity
field.semantics: Start point velocity.

field.name: EndPointVelocity
field.semantics: End point velocity.

fixedRecordData.name: LinearSegmentStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies linear object segment characteristics.

field.name: SegmentNumber
field.semantics: Identifies the individual segment.

field.name: PercentComplete
field.semantics: Specifies the percent completion of the segment.

field.name: IsLocationModified
field.semantics: Whether the location of the linear segment has been modified since the last update.

field.name: IsOrientationModified
field.semantics: Whether the orientation of the linear segment has been modified since the last update.

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Specifies the location of the segment in the world coordinate system.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: Specifies the orientation of the segment.

field.name: Length
field.semantics: Specifies the length of the segment, in meters, extending in the positive X direction.

field.name: Width
field.semantics: Specifies the total width of the segment, in meters; one-half of the width shall extend in the positive Y direction, and one-half of the width shall extend in the negative Y direction.

field.name: Height
field.semantics: Specifies the height of the segment, in meters, above ground.

field.name: Depth
field.semantics: Specifies the depth of the segment, in meters, below ground level.

field.name: Damage
field.semantics: Specifies the damaged appearance of the segment.

field.name: State
field.semantics: Specifies whether or not the segment has been deactivated (it has ceased to exist in the synthetic environment).

field.name: IsFlaming
field.semantics: Specifies whether the segment is burning and flames are visible.

field.name: Predistributed
field.semantics: Specifies whether or not the segment was created before the start of the exercise.

field.name: IsSmoking
field.semantics: Specifies whether or not the segment is smoking (creating a smoke plume).

field.name: IEDPresent
field.semantics: Specifies whether the segment has or contains an IED.

fixedRecordData.name: LocalEulerAnglesStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The orientation of an object in the local coordinate system, as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section E.8.2.2.

field.name: LocalYaw
field.semantics: Heading from true North, positive to the right, in radians.

field.name: LocalPitch
field.semantics: Elevation angle above or below the local horizon, positive up, in radians. Limited to between -pi/2 and +pi/2, inclusive.

field.name: LocalRoll
field.semantics: Bank angle from the local horizontal, positive tilt to the right (also called right wing down), in radians.

fixedRecordData.name: LocationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The location of a point in space. Unless specified otherwise for the attribute, parameter, or datatype field using this datatype, the location is in the world coordinate system, as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 1.6.3.

field.name: X
field.semantics: Distance from the origin along the X axis.

field.name: Y
field.semantics: Distance from the origin along the Y axis.

field.name: Z
field.semantics: Distance from the origin along the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: MarkingStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Character set used in the marking and the string of characters to be interpreted for display.

field.name: MarkingEncodingType
field.semantics: Character set representation.

field.name: MarkingData
field.semantics: 11 element character string.

fixedRecordData.name: MinefieldDataPaintSchemeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Minefield Data-Paint Scheme [UID 202].

field.name: Algae
field.semantics: Identifies the algae build-up on the mine.

field.name: PaintScheme
field.semantics: Identifies the paint scheme of the mine.

fixedRecordData.name: MinefieldLaneMarkerStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying a minefield lane marker segment.

field.name: SegmentParameters
field.semantics: Specifies the minefield lane marker segment characteristics.

field.name: VisibleSide
field.semantics: Specifies the visible side(s) of the minefield lane marker segment.

fixedRecordData.name: MineFusingStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the type of primary fuse, the type of the secondary fuse and the anti-handling device status of a mine.

field.name: Primary
field.semantics: Specifies the type of the primary fuse of a mine.

field.name: Secondary
field.semantics: Specifies the type of the secondary fuse of a mine.

field.name: HasAntiHandlingDevice
field.semantics: Specifies the anti-handling device status of a mine.

fixedRecordData.name: Mode5MessageFormatsStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The message formats associated with an IFF Mode 5 transponder or interrogator. When used for a transponder object in the Regeneration mode, it indicates the message formats that the transponder is capable of supporting and could be in a reply to a Mode 5 interrogation. When used for a transponder in the Interactive mode, in a Reply or Squitter interaction, it indicates the specific message formats that it actually responded to for the Mode 5 interrogation. When used for an interrogator object in the Regeneration mode, it indicates the message formats that the interrogator is capable of supporting and could be sent in a Mode 5 interrogation. When used for an interrogator in the Interactive mode, in an Interrogation interaction, it indicates the specific Mode 5 message formats being requested.

field.name: MessageFormat0Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 0 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat1Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 1 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat2Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 2 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat3Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 3 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat4Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 4 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat5Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 5 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat6Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 6 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat7Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 7 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat8Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 8 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat9Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 9 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat10Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 10 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat11Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 11 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat12Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 12 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat13Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 13 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat14Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 14 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat15Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 15 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat16Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 16 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat17Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 17 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat18Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 18 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat19Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 19 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat20Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 20 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat21Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 21 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat22Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 22 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat23Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 23 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat24Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 24 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat25Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 25 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat26Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 26 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat27Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 27 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat28Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 28 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat29Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 29 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat30Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 30 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

field.name: MessageFormat31Included
field.semantics: Set to True when a message format 31 capability exists or is included in an interactive interrogation or reply.

fixedRecordData.name: Mode5STransponderLocationErrorIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The specification of errors in location and altitude information transmitted by a Mode 5 or Mode S transponder. Errors are defined as delta values from the truth location of the entity platform. They reflect either human or navigation system errors that might be present and manifest themselves in the data sent in a Mode 5 or Mode S reply or squitter report. If Mode 5 or S location errors are modeled, then this record shall be issued to convey the magnitude of the error for one or more of the location values that could have an error. Fields with no errors shall have all bits of that field set to zero.

field.name: DeltaLatitude
field.semantics: The delta error in latitude from the true latitude computed for the entity with a Mode 5 or S transponder. Delta latitude shall be represented as two's complement coded latitude with the Most Significant Bit (MSB) equal to -90 degrees. All bits of this field shall be set to zero if there is no error in latitude.

field.name: DeltaLongitude
field.semantics: The delta error in longitude from the true longitude computed for the entity. Delta longitude shall be represented as two's complement coded longitude with the Most Significant Bit (MSB) equal to -180 degrees. All bits of this field shall be set to zero if there is no error in longitude.

field.name: DeltaMode5SAltitude
field.semantics: The delta error in Mode 5 / Mode S Altitude of the entity with a Mode 5 or S transponder. All bits of this field shall be set to zero if there is no error in Mode 5 / Mode S altitude.

field.name: DeltaBarometricAltitude
field.semantics: The delta error in barometric altitude of the entity. All bits of this field shall be set to zero if there is no error in barometric altitude.

fixedRecordData.name: Mode5STransponderLocationIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Real-time location and altitude information transmitted by a Mode 5 or Mode S transponder.

field.name: Latitude
field.semantics: The latitude of the entity, represented as an 18-bit two's complement coded angle with the Most Significant Bit (MSB) equal to -90 degrees.

field.name: Longitude
field.semantics: The longitude of the entity, represented as an 18-bit two's complement coded angle with the Most Significant Bit (MSB) equal to -180 degrees.

field.name: Mode5SAltitude
field.semantics: The Mode 5 / Mode S Altitude of the entity.

field.name: BarometricAltitude
field.semantics: The Barometric Altitude of the entity.

fixedRecordData.name: ModeCAltitudeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The actual Mode C altitude.

field.name: PositiveNegativeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates either a Positive Altitude Above MSL (0) or a Negative Altitude Below MSL (1).

field.name: ModeCAltitude
field.semantics: The actual Mode C altitude, in the range 0 feet to 126 000 feet in 100-foot increments based on the PositiveNegativeIndicator field. A value of 2047 indicates to use Alternate Mode C Altitude (i.e., derived from entity truth data).

fixedRecordData.name: ModeSDAPSourceStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Mode S source of Downlink Aircraft Parameters (DAPs).

field.name: IndicatedAirSpeedDataIsPresent
field.semantics: Indicates whether there is an IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the IFFData array attribute that can be used as the source for the Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameter (DAP) for the Indicated Air Speed (IAS).

field.name: MachNumberDataIsPresent
field.semantics: Indicates whether there is an IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the IFFData array attribute that can be used as the source for the Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameter (DAP) for the Mach Number.

field.name: GroundSpeedDataIsPresent
field.semantics: Indicates whether there is an IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the IFFData array attribute that can be used as the source for the Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameter (DAP) for the Ground Speed.

field.name: MagneticHeadingDataIsPresent
field.semantics: Indicates whether there is an IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the IFFData array attribute that can be used as the source for the Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameter (DAP) for the Magnetic Heading.

field.name: TrackAngleRateDataIsPresent
field.semantics: Indicates whether there is an IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the IFFData array attribute that can be used as the source for the Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameter (DAP) for the Track Angle Rate.

field.name: TrueTrackAngleDataIsPresent
field.semantics: Indicates whether there is an IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the IFFData array attribute that can be used as the source for the Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameter (DAP) for the True Track Angle.

field.name: TrueAirspeedDataIsPresent
field.semantics: Indicates whether there is an IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the IFFData array attribute that can be used as the source for the Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameter (DAP) for the True Airspeed.

field.name: VerticalRateDataIsPresent
field.semantics: Indicates whether there is an IFF Data record either Present (1) or Not Present (0) in the IFFData array attribute that can be used as the source for the Mode S Downlink Aircraft Parameter (DAP) for the Vertical Rate.

fixedRecordData.name: ModeSInterrogatorIdentifierStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Mode S Interrogator Code (IC) information.

field.name: PrimaryICCode
field.semantics: Primary IC Code.

field.name: SecondaryICCode
field.semantics: Secondary IC Code.

fixedRecordData.name: ModeSLevelsPresentStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The Mode S levels the transponder or interrogator is able to support.

field.name: Level1IsPresent
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode S level 1 is present.

field.name: Level2ElementarySurveillanceIsPresent
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode S level 2 (Elementary Surveillance sublevel) is present.

field.name: Level2EnhancedSurveillanceIsPresent
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode S level 2 (Enhanced Surveillance sublevel) is present.

field.name: Level3IsPresent
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode S level 3 is present.

field.name: Level4IsPresent
field.semantics: Set to True when Mode S level 4 is present.

fixedRecordData.name: MunitionReloadStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the reload information for an entity munition.

field.name: MunitionType
field.semantics: Identifies the entity type of the munition.

field.name: StationOrLauncher
field.semantics: Indicates the station or launcher to which the munition is assigned.

field.name: StandardQuantity
field.semantics: The standard quantity of this munition type normally loaded at this station/launcher.

field.name: MaximumQuantity
field.semantics: The maximum quantity of this munition type that this station/launcher is capable of holding.

field.name: StandardQuantityReloadTime
field.semantics: The number of seconds of simulation time normally required to reload the standard quantity of this munition type at this station/launcher.

field.name: MaximumQuantityReloadTime
field.semantics: The number of seconds of simulation time normally required to reload the maximum possible quantity of this munition type at this station/launcher.

fixedRecordData.name: MunitionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the information regarding an entity's munition.

field.name: MunitionType
field.semantics: Identifies the entity type of the munition.

field.name: StationOrLauncher
field.semantics: Indicates the station or launcher to which the munition is assigned.

field.name: Quantity
field.semantics: The quantity remaining of this munition.

field.name: MunitionStatus
field.semantics: Specifies the status of the munition.

fixedRecordData.name: NamedLocationIdentificationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify the discrete positional relationship of the part entity with respect to its host entity. Based on the Named Location Identification record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.62.

field.name: StationName
field.semantics: The station name within the host at which the part entity is located.

field.name: StationNumber
field.semantics: The number of the particular wing station, cargo hold, and so on, at which the part is attached.

fixedRecordData.name: NamedLocationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The discrete positional relationship of the constituent part object with respect to its host object. Based on the specifications in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 of the IsPartOf PDU Part Location (Section 7.8.5 item e) and Named Location ID (Section 7.8.5 item f) fields.

field.name: StationNumber
field.semantics: The number of the particular station at which the constituent part is attached.

field.name: StationName
field.semantics: The name of the station where the constituent part is located.

fixedRecordData.name: NETIDStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The NET ID for HAVE QUICK radios.

field.name: NetNumber
field.semantics: The net number ranging from 0 to 999 decimal.

field.name: FrequencyTable
field.semantics: The Frequency Table portion of the NET ID in use.

field.name: Mode
field.semantics: The mode.

fixedRecordData.name: OrientationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The orientation of an object in space. Unless specified otherwise for the attribute, parameter, or datatype field using this datatype, the orientation is in the world coordinate system, as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 1.6.3

field.name: Psi
field.semantics: Rotation about the Z axis.

field.name: Theta
field.semantics: Rotation about the Y axis.

field.name: Phi
field.semantics: Rotation about the X axis.

fixedRecordData.name: OwnershipStatusStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Conveys ownership and conflict status information associated with an object.

field.name: ObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: Identifier for the object that is the subject of this record.

field.name: OwnershipStatus
field.semantics: The ownership and/or ownership conflict status of the object.

fixedRecordData.name: PerimeterPointStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying the location of a perimeter point.

field.name: X
field.semantics: Specifies the X coordinate.

field.name: Y
field.semantics: Specifies the Y coordinate.

fixedRecordData.name: PlumeDimensionRateStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying plume dimension rates.

field.name: LengthRate
field.semantics: Variation of plume length.

field.name: WidthRate
field.semantics: Variation of plume width.

field.name: HeightRate
field.semantics: Variation of plume height.

fixedRecordData.name: PlumeDimensionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying plume dimensions.

field.name: Length
field.semantics: Plume length.

field.name: Width
field.semantics: Plume width.

field.name: Height
field.semantics: Plume height.

fixedRecordData.name: Point2GeomRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Point 2 geometry record.

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location X, Y, Z.

field.name: Velocity
field.semantics: Velocity Vx, Vy, Vz.

fixedRecordData.name: PrecisionAimpointStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of directed energy weapon targeting information when the target is a specific target entity.

field.name: TargetSpotLocation
field.semantics: Instantaneous location of the target spot in world coordinates.

field.name: TargetSpotRelativeLocation
field.semantics: Instantaneous location of the target spot in the target entity's coordinate frame.

field.name: TargetSpotVelocityVector
field.semantics: Instantaneous target spot velocity.

field.name: TargetSpotAccelerationVector
field.semantics: Instantaneous target spot acceleration.

field.name: TargetObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: The object instance ID of the target affected by the weapon.

field.name: TargetComponentIdentifier
field.semantics: The entity component that is being targeted.

field.name: BeamSpotType
field.semantics: The beam spot type specifies how the DE precision weapon energy is distributed on the target.

field.name: BeamSpotShape
field.semantics: The beam spot ellipse shape approximating the irradiance region arriving at the target.

field.name: PeakIrradiance
field.semantics: Peak irradiance of emissions.

fixedRecordData.name: PropulsionSystemDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Information describing a propulsion system in terms of power settings and current RPM.

field.name: PowerSetting
field.semantics: The power setting of the propulsion system, after any response lags have been incorporated.

field.name: EngineRPM
field.semantics: The current engine speed.

fixedRecordData.name: RadioTypeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Type of radio, based on the Radio Type record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.71.

field.name: EntityKind
field.semantics: The kind of the entity, set to Radio (7).

field.name: Domain
field.semantics: The domain that the radio normally operates in.

field.name: CountryCode
field.semantics: The country to which the design of the radio entity is attributed.

field.name: Category
field.semantics: The primary type of information that is transmitted or received by the radio when in operation.

field.name: Subcategory
field.semantics: The Radio Nomenclature System associated with the radio identified in the Specific field (e.g., a JETDS PRC-series radio).

field.name: Specific
field.semantics: The specific radio associated with the Radio Nomenclature System contained in the Subcategory field.

field.name: Extra
field.semantics: The version or variation of the radio.

fixedRecordData.name: RecordSetStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: A set of records and record details.

field.name: RecordSetIdentifier
field.semantics: This field shall specify the data structure used to convey the parameter values of the record for each record.

field.name: RecordSetSerialNumber
field.semantics: This field shall specify the serial number of the first record in the array.

field.name: RecordValues
field.semantics: This field contains the records of the format specified by the Record ID field.

fixedRecordData.name: RecordStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record data.

field.name: NumberOfBits
field.semantics: Number of bits of data.

fixedRecordData.name: RectVol1GeomRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Rectangular Volume 1 geometry record.

field.name: CornerLocation
field.semantics: Corner location X, Y, Z.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: Orientation, specified by Euler angles.

fixedRecordData.name: RectVol2GeomRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Rectangular Volume 2 geometry record.

field.name: CornerLocation
field.semantics: Corner location X, Y, Z.

field.name: DimensionsRate
field.semantics: Variation of dimensions.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: Orientation, specified by Euler angles.

field.name: Velocity
field.semantics: Velocity Vx, Vy, Vz.

field.name: AngularVelocity
field.semantics: Angular velocity Vx, Vy, Vz.

fixedRecordData.name: RectVol3GeomRecStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying Rectangular Volume 3 geometry record.

field.name: CenterLocation
field.semantics: Center location X, Y, Z.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: Orientation, specified by Euler angles.

fixedRecordData.name: RegularGridAxisStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying regular (fixed spacing) axis data.

field.name: NumberOfPoints
field.semantics: Specifies the number of grid locations along the Xi axis.

field.name: InitialIndex
field.semantics: Specifies the index of the initial grid point along the Xi domain axis.

fixedRecordData.name: RelativePositionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Relative position in right-handed Cartesian coordinates.

field.name: BodyXDistance
field.semantics: The distance from the reference location along the X axis.

field.name: BodyYDistance
field.semantics: The distance from the reference location along the Y axis.

field.name: BodyZDistance
field.semantics: The distance from the reference location along the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: RelativeRangeBearingStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Relative position in polar coordinates.

field.name: Range
field.semantics: The range from the reference location.

field.name: Bearing
field.semantics: The bearing from the reference location.

fixedRecordData.name: RPRUserDefinedTag
fixedRecordData.semantics: This User Defined Tag enables federations to exchange timestamps for updates and interactions for real-time execution. Federations that wish to exchange additional information in the User Defined Tag may create a custom version of this fixed record that contains additional fields at the end.

field.name: Timestamp
field.semantics: Time for which the update or interaction is valid. See the Time Representation table for semantics.

field.name: IsAbsoluteTime
field.semantics: Set to true to indicate if the timestamp is Absolute time, i.e. synchronized with the reference time.

fixedRecordData.name: ScaledWorldOrientationQuaternionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The orientation of an object in the world coordinate system, described by a quaternion, as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section E.8.2.3.

field.name: Scaled0
field.semantics: Scalar component of the quaternion, scaled to a 16-bit unsigned integer.

field.name: X
field.semantics: X component of the quaternion.

field.name: Y
field.semantics: Y component of the quaternion.

field.name: Z
field.semantics: Z component of the quaternion.

fixedRecordData.name: SensorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Represents an entity's sensor information.

field.name: SensorType
field.semantics: Specifies the sensor type.

field.name: SensorOnOffStatus
field.semantics: Specifies the on/off status of the sensor.

field.name: Station
field.semantics: Indicates the station to which the sensor is assigned.

field.name: Quantity
field.semantics: Specifies the quantity of this sensor.

fixedRecordData.name: SeparationVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify the physical separation of an entity from another entity. Based on the Separation VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.6.

field.name: SeparationReason
field.semantics: The reason for the separation.

field.name: PreEntityIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether the entity existed prior to the separation and, if so, in what manner.

field.name: ParentObjectID
field.semantics: The object ID of the parent entity/object.

field.name: StationLocation
field.semantics: The station that this entity was attached to prior to separation if known.

fixedRecordData.name: ShaftDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Rotation state of a ship's propulsion shaft.

field.name: CurrentShaftRate
field.semantics: The current shaft speed. A positive shaft speed indicates that the shaft is rotating in a clockwise direction (when viewed from the stern to bow), and a negative shaft speed indicates an anti-clockwise direction.

field.name: OrderedShaftRate
field.semantics: The ordered shaft speed. If the ordered shaft speed is different from the current shaft speed then the shaft will accelerate or decelerate at the shaft rate of change. A positive shaft speed indicates that the shaft is rotating in a clockwise direction (when viewed from the stern to bow), and a negative shaft speed indicates an anti-clockwise direction.

field.name: ShaftRateOfChange
field.semantics: The absolute value of the shaft's rotational acceleration. The shaft will change its rotational speed at this rate if the current shaft speed differs from the ordered shaft rate.

fixedRecordData.name: SilentAggregateStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: These fields contain information about subaggregates not registered in the federation.

field.name: AggregateType
field.semantics: This field shall specify the aggregates common to this system list.

field.name: NumberOfAggregatesOfThisType
field.semantics: This field shall specify the number of aggregates that have the type specified in AggregateType field.

fixedRecordData.name: SilentEntityStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: These fields contain information about entities not registered in the federation.

field.name: NumberOfEntitiesOfThisType
field.semantics: This field shall specify the number of entities that have the type specified in the field EntityType.

field.name: EntityType
field.semantics: This field shall specify the entity types common to the entities in this system list.

field.name: EntityAppearance
field.semantics: This field shall specify the entity appearances of entities in the aggregate that deviate from the default. The number of array elements shall be between zero and the number of entities of this type. Simulation applications representing the aggregate that do not model entity appearances shall set this field to zero elements. Other simulations can safely assume that any entity appearances not specified are default appearances.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialFPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm FPW (2) and FPB (6).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: VelocityVector
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's position is changing over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialFVStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm FVW (5) and FVB (9).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: VelocityVector
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's position is changing over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: AccelerationVector
field.semantics: The magnitude of the change in linear velocity of an object over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialRPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm RPW (3) and RPB (7).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: VelocityVector
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's position is changing over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: AngularVelocity
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's orientation is changing over time, in body coordinates.

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialRVStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm RVW (4) and RVB (8).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: VelocityVector
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's position is changing over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: AccelerationVector
field.semantics: The magnitude of the change in linear velocity of an object over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: AngularVelocity
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's orientation is changing over time, in body coordinates.

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

field.name: Color

field.name: Contrast
field.semantics: Describes 16 levels of contrast (low to high) distinguishing variation of object from surrounding surface.

field.name: Material
field.semantics: Describes the type of material.

fixedRecordData.name: Sphere1GeomRecStruct

field.name: CentroidLocation

fixedRecordData.name: Sphere2GeomRecStruct

field.name: CentroidLocation
field.semantics: Centroid location X, Y, Z.

field.name: RadiusRate

field.name: Velocity
field.semantics: Velocity Vx, Vy, Vz.

field.name: AngularVelocity

fixedRecordData.name: SquitterAirbornePositionReportIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Airborne Position Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards. If it is desired to transmit an exact replication of this squitter report, it may be sent using the GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: AircraftAddressSource
field.semantics: The source of the Aircraft Address.

field.name: FormatType
field.semantics: The Format Type.

field.name: ICAOSpare
field.semantics: Represent the spare field that exists in a Squitter Airborne Position Report.

field.name: SurveillanceStatus
field.semantics: Indicates the surveillance status associated with this report.

field.name: TurnRateSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether the aircraft is turning or whether the receiving simulation is to make that determination by examining entity truth data.

field.name: AltitudeSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether the altitude is to be computed locally or is provided in a Mode5STransponderLocationIFFDataStruct.

field.name: TimeTypeSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether this squitter report was output on an even or odd second or whether the receiving simulation is to determine that based on its Mode S interrogator model.

field.name: LatLongSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether the lat/long is to be computed locally or is provided in a Mode5STransponderLocationIFFDataStruct.

fixedRecordData.name: SquitterAirborneVelocityReportIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Airborne Velocity Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards. If it is desired to transmit an exact replication of this squitter report, it may be sent using the GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: AircraftAddressSource
field.semantics: The source of the Aircraft Address.

field.name: FormatType
field.semantics: The Format Type.

field.name: Subtype
field.semantics: The subtype associated with this report. (See the appropriate ICAO publication for the subtype values.)

field.name: IsSynced
field.semantics: Indicates the sync status as being either Synced (True) or Not Synced (False).

field.name: GroundTrackSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether the ground track is to be computed locally from truth data or is provided in a GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: TRNRateSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether the Turn (TRN) Rate is to be computed locally from truth data or is provided in a GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: VRTRateSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether the Vertical Rate of Climb (VRT) Rate is to be computed locally from truth data or is provided in a GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

fixedRecordData.name: SquitterEventDrivenReportIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Event-Driven Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards. If it is desired to transmit an exact replication of this squitter report, it may be sent using the GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: SquitterEventIdentification
field.semantics: The ICAO Downlink Format (DF) number assigned to this type of event data.

field.name: SquitterEventData
field.semantics: The specific event data being sent.

fixedRecordData.name: SquitterIdentificationReportIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Identification Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards. If it is desired to transmit an exact replication of this squitter report, it may be sent using the GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: AircraftAddressSource
field.semantics: The source of the Aircraft Address.

field.name: FormatType
field.semantics: The Format Type.

field.name: AircraftTypeWake
field.semantics: Aircraft type and wake data.

field.name: AircraftIDSource
field.semantics: The data source for the Aircraft ID.

field.name: ICAOSpare
field.semantics: Represent the spare field that exists in a Squitter Identification Report.

fixedRecordData.name: SquitterSurfacePositionReportIFFDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: This replicates the functional data contained in a Squitter Surface Position Report transmitted by a Mode S transponder in accordance with ICAO standards. This report is transmitted when an aircraft is on the ground or aboard ship. If it is desired to transmit an exact replication of this squitter report, it may be sent using the GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: AircraftAddressSource
field.semantics: The source of the Aircraft Address.

field.name: FormatType
field.semantics: The Format Type.

field.name: Movement
field.semantics: Movement data.

field.name: HeadingSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether the heading is to be computed locally from truth data or is provided in a GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: VRTRateSource
field.semantics: Indicates whether the Vertical Rate of Climb (VRT) Rate is to be computed locally from truth data or is provided in a GroundInitiatedCommBIFFDataStruct.

field.name: ICAOSpare
field.semantics: Represents the 24-bit ICAO Spare field contained in a Squitter Surface Position Report.

fixedRecordData.name: StorageFuelReloadStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying an entity's engine fuel reload information.

field.name: StandardQuantity
field.semantics: The standard quantity of this fuel type normally loaded at this fuel location.

field.name: MaximumQuantity
field.semantics: The maximum quantity of this fuel type that this fuel location is capable of holding.

field.name: StandardQuantityReloadTime
field.semantics: The number of seconds of simulation time normally required to reload the standard quantity of this fuel type at this specific fuel location.

field.name: MaximumQuantityReloadTime
field.semantics: The number of seconds of simulation time normally required to reload the maximum possible quantity of this fuel type at this fuel location.

field.name: FuelMeasurementUnits
field.semantics: Identifies the fuel measurement units.

field.name: FuelType
field.semantics: Identifies the type of fuel.

field.name: FuelLocation
field.semantics: Indicates the location of the fuel as related to the entity.

fixedRecordData.name: StorageFuelStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Record specifying an entity's engine fuel information.

field.name: FuelQuantity
field.semantics: The quantity of fuel remaining, in increments specified by the FuelMeasurementUnits field.

field.name: FuelMeasurementUnits
field.semantics: Identifies the fuel measurement units.

field.name: FuelType
field.semantics: Identifies the type of fuel.

field.name: FuelLocation
field.semantics: Indicates the location of the fuel as related to the entity.

field.name: Quantity
field.semantics: The number of units of the supply type. The unit measure depends on the supply type and shall use the SI units of measurement used for such supplies.

field.name: Field1
field.semantics: This field shall be set to zero.

fixedRecordData.name: VariableDatumStruct

field.name: DatumID
field.semantics: The fixed datum id represented by a 32-bit enumeration.

field.name: DatumLength
field.semantics: This field shall specify the length of the variable datum in bits.

field.name: DatumValue
field.semantics: The value of the variable datum. The field format depends on the type of datum as specified by the DatumID. If necessary, this field includes padding to a 64-bit boundary.

alternative.semantics: Detail for a major modulation type for which no statement is provided. This alternative is also used to implement a Simple Intercom capability using RadioTransmitter objects, see IEEE Std 1278.1 Section C.3. Then the value indicates the intercom priority in the range 0 to 255, with 0 = Exempt - Always heard regardless of the highest priority in use 1 = Highest Priority 255 = Lowest Priority

alternative.semantics: Detailed modulation type for the Carrier Phase Shift Modulation (CPSM) major modulation type.

alternative.name: SATCOMModulationType
alternative.semantics: Detailed modulation type for the SATCOM major modulation type. Note that this is a low-fidelity representation of SATCOM modulation.
